metadata.title: SceneFlow AI - Ukwenziwa kwamavidiyo kusetshenziswa i-AI
metadata.description: Guqula imibono yakho ibe amavidiyo asezingeni eliphezulu usebenzisa uhlelo oluzenzakalelayo lokusebenza olusekelwe kubuchwepheshe be-AI.

hero.headline: Cabanga ngendaba. I-SceneFlow iphatha uhlelo lokusebenza olulandelanayo.
hero.subheadline: Dlulela ngale kokunikeza imiyalelo edinisayo. Gxila ngokuphelele embonweni wakho wobuciko usebenzisa inqubo yokukhiqiza ezenzakalelayo neyizinga lobungcweti.
hero.audienceMicroLine: Yakhelwe abadali abafuna imiphumela, kanye namaqembu afuna ukubona ukuthi isebenza kanjani.
hero.ctaToolStack: Bona indlela okuthatha ngayo indawo yeqoqo lakho lamathuluzi.
hero.languagePrompt: Izwa iqhawe ngolimi lwakho — inqubo efanayo, izimakethe ezintsha
hero.multilangHint: I-Hero yenza ukufakwa kwamazwi ngezilimi eziyi-7 — uhlelo oluphelele lusekela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 esigabeni sokukhiqiza.

pills.label: Vumela ngaphambi kwevidiyo yokugcina
pills.detail: Bukeza izigaba zokubuka kuqala (pre-vis beats) ngaphambi kokwenza i-render.

pills.label: Hlola indaba yakho kuqala
pills.detail: Qonda ukuthi yini ephumelelayo ngaphambi kokuchitha imali eningi.

automate.label: Yenze isebenze ngokuzenzakalelayo
automate.description: Inqubo yomsebenzi eqondiswayo — vumela ukubuka kuqala, thumela ngokushesha

paths.label: UMdali
paths.outcome: Khipha umkhiqizo ngesikhathi — yeka ukuwudala kabusha kuwo wonke amathuluzi
paths.narrative: Unayo indaba, kodwa isiqephu ngasinye sidinga ukuthi uphinde ukhiphe amafayela (assets), ufake imiyalelo emisha, futhi uthembe ukuthi ukulandelana okufanele kuyagcinwa. I-SceneFlow ixhumanisa Uchungechunge, i-Blueprint, kanye neSigaba Sokukhiqiza endaweni eyodwa — ngakho-ke uvumela ukubukeka kwesithombe esigabeni sokubuka kuqala (pre-vis), udale izigcawu ngokulandelana kwazo, bese ukhipha iziqephu ezihambisanayo ngesikhathi esibekiwe kunokuba uqale phansi ukwakha konke.
useCases: Amafilimu okubhala ngamaqiniso nochungechunge lwamafilimu okubhala ngamaqiniso

example.challengeDescription: Unombhalo omuhle kakhulu, kodwa ukufunda amathuluzi ayisithupha ahlukene okudala nokuhlela — noma ukubhajwa emijikelezweni yamavidiyo ephindaphindeka ngokungapheli — kubambezela inqubo yokulayisha ividiyo ngayinye. Impumelelo yochungechunge lwamavidiyo ku-YouTube kanye nesivinini esidingekayo ezinhlelweni ezifana ne-YouTube TV kudinga ukuthi umsebenzi wenziwe ngokushesha okukhulu kunalokho okungenziwa ngamathuluzi e-AI ahlukene futhi angahlelekile.
example.solutionDescription: Khiqiza uchungechunge lweziqephu namavidiyo amafushane abamba amehlo usuka esitudiyweni esisodwa — kusukela ekwakhiweni kokuqala kokubonwayo okugxile ekuhlelweni kwezigcawu, ukuqinisekisa ukugeleza okuhlelekile kochungechunge, kuya ekulungiseni imikhiqizo yokugcina esilungele ukushicilelwa emkhakheni wabadali bokuqukethwe oholwa yi-YouTube.
example.win: Shintsha usuke ekulayisheni okuvela ngezikhathi ezithile uye ohlelweni lokukhiqiza oluthembekile, oludinga umzamo noma izindlela ezingeziwe ezincane.

paths.label: Ithimba langaphakathi
paths.outcome: Shintsha izinqubo zabahlinzeki ezihamba kancane — lawula uhlobo lomkhiqizo kanye nesabelomali
paths.narrative: Izicelo zangaphakathi zamavidiyo ziyaqongeleleka ngenkathi amanani aphakanyiswa yizinkampani zangaphandle enza umsebenzi uthathe isikhathi eside, kanti nemihlahlandlela yomkhiqizo iyashintsha-shintsha njalo uma kwenziwa izinguquko. I-SceneFlow ihlanganisa imisebenzi yokuqeqesha nokuthuthukisa abasebenzi (L&D), ezokuxhumana, kanye nokukhiqizwa kwamavidiyo achaza imikhiqizo ibe uhlelo olulodwa oluhleliwe — ithimba lakho liba namandla aphelele phezu kombhalo, uhlaka lokuqala olubonakalayo (pre-vis), kanye nomkhiqizo wokugcina, ngaphandle kokudinga ukuqasha isitudiyo noma ukulinda abahlinzeki bezinsizakalo bangaphandle.
useCases: Ukufunda Nokuthuthukiswa Kwabasebenzi kanye Nokuthotshelwa Kwemithetho Ezinkampanini

example.challengeTitle: Umsebenzi Ongaqediwe Womhlinzeki kanye Nokuchezuka Kwesithunzi Somkhiqizo
example.challengeDescription: Amaqembu ezokuxhumana, ezokuqeqesha nokuthuthukiswa kwabasebenzi (L&D), kanye nawokumaketha achitha amasonto elinde amavidiyo avela ezinkampanini zangaphandle — noma abhekane nenqwaba yamathuluzi adidayo ngaphandle kohlelo oluzinzile olungasetshenziswa ngaphakathi enkampanini. Yonke le migwaqo iholela ekungabini bikho kobunye obuqhubekayo ekumeleleni uhlobo lwenkampani (branding) kanye nokuma kwemikhankaso.
example.solutionDescription: Yabela abasebenzi umsebenzi wokukhiqiza ividiyo ngaphakathi kwesabelomali esicacile samakhredithi — kusetshenziswa izifanekiso zomkhiqizo, kutholakala imvume ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa kwenguqulo yokugcina, futhi kungabikho zindleko zezinsuku zabasebenzi noma izigaba zokuhlela ezingenamkhawulo wesikhathi.
example.win: Khipha izinto zokuqeqesha, ezokuxhumana namavidiyo emikhankaso ngokohlelo lwakho — hhayi ngokulinda uhlu lwemisebenzi engakaqedwa yomhlinzeki.

paths.label: Indawo yokukhiqiza
paths.outcome: Guqula umkhakha othile ube umkhiqizo ngokusebenzisa inqubo ephindaphindekayo yokwamukela umsebenzi nokuletha umphumela.
paths.narrative: Umsebenzi wokwenza amavidiyo ngokwezidingo zamakhasimende uba nenzuzo kuze kube yilapho ikhasimende ngalinye seliba yinto eyenzeka kanye kuphela — okudinga amathuluzi amasha, izinqubo ezintsha zokudlulisa umsebenzi, kanye nenzuzo enyamalalayo ngenxa yokubuyekeza umsebenzi. I-SceneFlow iguqula umkhakha wakho okhethekile ube umkhiqizo: inqubo yokwamukela umsebenzi ephindaphindekayo, izifanekiso ezingasetshenziswa ngaphansi kwegama lakho (white-label templates), ukulandisa okwenziwa ngezwi elilingiswe ngobuchwepheshe, kanye nendlela ecacile kusukela ekuqaleni (imininingwane yomsebenzi) kuya ekulethweni kwevidiyo ye-MP4.
useCases: Izifanekiso zesitudiyo ezingenziwa ngaphansi kwegama lakho
Uhambo lokubuka izindawo nezakhiwo kanye nezindawo zokwamukela izivakashi

example.challengeTitle: Izixazululo Eziklanyelwe Imikhakha Ethile, Akukho Sis-temu Esiphindekayo
example.challengeDescription: Amakhasimende abhekene nezindaba zempilo (memoirs), ukulondoloza ifa, ezindlu nomhlaba, kanye nezemfundo adinga imisebenzi eqedwa ngokushesha — kodwa iphrojekthi ngayinye iqala phansi sha. Ukudluliselwa komsebenzi ngamunye kanye nokubuyekezwa okuphindaphindwayo — okufana nokudlala imishini yokugembula — okuthinta imibhalo, izithombe, amazwi, amavidiyo, umculo namathuluzi okuhlela, kunciphisa kakhulu inzuzo etholakala emsebenzini omningi.
example.solutionTitle: Guqula Insizakalo Yakho Yamavidiyo Ibe Umkhiqizo
example.solutionDescription: Yakha izinqubo zomsebenzi eziphindaphindekayo zezitudiyo ezikhiqiza izindaba zempilo (memoirs) kanye nemikhakha ekhethekile yebhizinisi. Lokhu kubandakanya ukulayishwa kwama-template, ukwenziwa kwamakhophi amazwi, ama-avatar, kanye nokuvunywa kwemibono ngaphambi kokukhiqiza — yenza izinguquko ngokwezidingo zekhasimende ngalinye futhi wandise inzuzo ngokwandisa ivolumu yomsebenzi.
example.win: Qala ibhizinisi lokwenza amavidiyo alondoloza izinkumbulo noma insizakalo ekhethekile yesitudiyo ehlinzekwa ngendlela ephindaphindekayo — hhayi umsebenzi wesikhashana owenziwa kanye kuphela.

paths.label: I-ejensi
paths.outcome: Ukwethulwa kwemibono ngokushesha kanye nokuhlinzekwa kwamakhasimende ngendlela enwebekayo
paths.narrative: Ukuphumelela ekwethulweni kwephrojekthi kusho ukukhombisa umbono — hhayi ukuwuchaza nje — kodwa izigaba zokubona umbono ngaphambi kwesikhathi (pre-viz) kanye nokuguqulela umsebenzi ube ngolimi lendawo (localization) kuvame ukudla inzuzo ngaphambi kokuba kusayinwe inkontileka. I-SceneFlow yenza ukuthi izinhlaka ezithintekayo zibone ngokushesha izinhlaka zokuqala zombono (pre-viz) ezilungele ukuboniswa kumakhasimende, bese yandisa izinga lokulethwa komsebenzi emikhankasweni nasezilulimini ezingaphezu kuka-70 ngaphandle kokuthi kuphinde kwakhiwe kabusha inqubo yokusebenza kuyo yonke i-akhawunti.

example.challengeDescription: Ukunqoba isethulo sephrojekthi (pitch) kuyingxenye nje yomsebenzi. Imisebenzi yamakhasimende ephindaphindekayo idinga ukwenziwa ngokushesha — kodwa ukudluliselana umsebenzi kanye nokuzama ukuphinda ukhiqize ividiyo kaningi usebenzisa amathuluzi ahlukene okudala nokuhlela, kwenza inqubo yonke ihambe kancane.
example.solutionDescription: Shintsha usuke esigabeni sokwethula imibono uye ekukhiqizeni okuqhubekayo, usebenzisa izindlela zokulawula eziqinisekisa ukuphepha komkhiqizo, ukubuyekezwa kwamakhasimende ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa komsebenzi wokugcina, kanye nezindleko zamakhredithi ezibikezelekayo ngomsebenzi ngamunye.
example.win: Feza izinqubo zokwethula amaphrojekthi kanye nomsebenzi wamakhasimende oqhubekayo ngokushesha okukhulu, unciphise ubungozi bokukhiqiza futhi wandise inzuzo.

paths.label: Ukukhiqizwa Kwamafilimu
paths.outcome: Umbhalo we-animatic esebenzisanayo ongayibuka futhi uyihlole ngaphambi kokuba uqale ukuqopha
paths.narrative: Ngaphambilini, ukwenza uhlaka oluyisibonelo (previz) nokuhlola imibono yezethameli kwakusho amasonto amaningi okudala imidwebo yendaba (storyboards), ukuqopha amazwi esikhashana, nokwenza izinqumo ezibizayo ezisekelwe ekuqageleni ngaphambi kokuba kuqale ukuthwetshulwa. I-SceneFlow iguqula umbhalo wakho ube yisibonelo esinyakazayo esisebenzisanayo (interactive animatic) kusetshenziswa i-Express pre-vis — yenze ibe ngcono nge-Audience Resonance, uyibonise nge-Screening Room, bese ukhupha imali kuphela uma indaba isisebenza kahle futhi yamukelekile.

example.challengeTitle: Ukulungiselela ukubona ngeso lengqondo (pre-visualization) okuhamba kancane ngaphambi kokuba uhlole indaba
example.challengeDescription: Unayo imibhalo yefilimu — kodwa ukufundwa kwayo ngokuhlanganyela, izigaba zokudala imidwebo yezigcawu (storyboards), kanye namathuluzi okubuka kuqala (previz) angahlelekile kahle kubambezela ukwethulwa kweprojekthi kubatshali-zimali, ukuhlolwa kwayo phambi kwezethameli, kanye nezinqumo zokuyivumela ukuthi iqhubeke.
example.solutionTitle: Ukubona Ngeso Lengqondo Kwangaphambili Okusebenzisanayo Okusekelwe Kumbhalo
example.solutionDescription: Layisha umbhalo wakho (we-MDX, FDX, nezinye izinhlobo zamafayela), uwuthuthukise usebenzisa i-Audience Resonance, bese udala uhlaka olubonakalayo olusebenzisanayo (pre-vis) ukuze uluhlole — konke lokhu kwenziwa ngokushesha nangokuhambisana kwezigaba ezahlukene (beats), ngezinketho zezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 kanye nokufakwa kwezilimi eziningi ngokushesha.
example.win: Qinisekisa ukuthi indaba nezethameli kuyahambisana ngaphambi kokuqala ukuthatha izithombe ezisemqoka — usebenzisa i-animatic engabelwana ngayo, hhayi inqubo yokwenza uhlaka lokuqala (previz) ethatha amasonto amaningi.

whySceneFlow.title: Kungani SceneFlow kunokuba kube amathuluzi okufaka umyalo nokukhiqiza okuqukethwe?
whySceneFlow.subtitle: I-Gemini Studio ne-Google Flow zivelele ekuphatheni iziqeshana. I-SceneFlow ihlanganisa inqubo ephelele yokukhiqiza.

rows.us: Izigaba ezihleliwe ezinemigomo eyisisekelo engashintshwa esinyathelweni ngasinye

rows.them: Ukungaguquguquki kwendlela yokusebenza ngesandla kuzo zonke izikhathi zokusebenza
rows.us: Reference Library + Beat Frames vala izithombe ngaphambi kwevidiyo
Audience Resonance ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa kokubonakalayo; Screening Room ngaphambi kokushicilelwa

rows.them: Ayikho inqubo yokukhiqiza noma ukudluliselwa komsebenzi
rows.us: Umbhalo → imifudlana → ukuhlanganisa → ukusabalalisa kuhlelo lokusebenza olulodwa

beatFirstPipeline.title: Inqubo Yokukhiqiza Ividiyo Eqala Ngesigqi
beatFirstPipeline.subtitle: Vumela ngaphambi kokukhiqiza umphumela — hhayi ukuvuselela okufana nomshini wokugembula.
beatFirstPipeline.intro: Akukho ukukhiqiza ngokulinganisa nokuhlola. Uyabuka kuqala bese uvumela ukubukeka kwayo ngaphambi kokuba i-SceneFlow isebenzise amakhredithi kuvidiyo yokugcina.
beatFirstPipeline.description: I-SceneFlow ihlela inqubo yokugunyazwa kokubonakalayo esigabeni ngasinye: i-Express Pre-vis yokubuyekeza, i-Beat Frames yokukhiya ukwakheka, bese kuba yi-F2V ngesigqi ngasinye. Uyawulungisa umbonakalo ngaphambi kokuchitha amakhredithi ezintweni ezingahleliwe noma amaphutha okukhiqiza (hallucinations).
steps: Express Pre-vis — yabelana ngemigqoqo yomculo enezithombe ukuze ibuyekezwe ngemizuzu embalwa
Beat Frames — vala ukwakheka kokuqala/kokuphela ngokuhambisana nokuqhubeka kwe-Reference Library
I-F2V ngesigqi — khiqiza ividiyo usebenzisa ozimele (frames) abagunyaziwe, hhayi imiyalelo engacacile.
Uchungechunge oluqhubekayo lwe-EXT — izinyathelo zokwandisa ezingama-secondu angu-7 (ezakhelwe ngaphakathi) zezigaba ezinde zezingxoxo
Production Mixer — ukulungiswa kwesikhathi, umsindo, kanye nokuthunyelwa kokusakazwayo ku-Screening Room
beatFirstPipeline.footerLine: Ukunciphisa ukuphinda kwenziwe imifanekiso yemishini yokugembula — vumela imifanekiso ngaphambi kokusebenzisa imali yokugcina kuvidiyo.

trustSafeguard.title: Izithiyo zokuvikela ezinamazinga amaningi ze-
trustSafeguard.subtitle: Ukuphepha okwakhelwe ngaphakathi yi-Google kukho konke okukhiqizwayo, Izinsizakalo Zobuciko Ezandisiwe ezinezindlela zokulawula lapho kusebenza imikhawulo yenqubomgomo, kanye nokuhlola nokunciphisa ubungozi okwengeziwe kuyo yonke inqubo yakho yokusebenza ku-Studio.

tiers.title: Ezokuphepha ze-Google Zangaphakathi
tiers.description: Yonke inqubo yokukhiqiza izithombe namavidiyo idlula ezihlungini zokuphepha zakwa-Google, lapho amazinga okuhlola elungiselelwe khona izinqubo zomsebenzi wobungcweti bokudala—hhayi izilungiselelo ezijwayelekile ezihloselwe abathengi abavamile.
highlights: I-Vertex Responsible AI mayelana nokukhiqizwa kwe-Veo, i-Imagen, ne-Gemini
Imikhawulo yomonakalo elungiselelwe ukukhiqizwa kokuqukethwe kwefilimu
Izinsiza zakho zobuciko azisetshenziswa ukuqeqesha amamodeli abiwayo.

tiers.title: Izithiyo Zokuvikela Ezandisiwe
tiers.description: Uma indlela eyinhloko ivinjwe yinqubomgomo, i-Extended Creative Services enezinhlelo zokulawula (guardrails) ingakuqedela ukulethwa—kodwa kuphela ngemuva kokuba kubuyekezwe okuqukethwe okwengeziwe ngaphambi kokuba kugcinwe.
highlights: Ukulungiswa okusheshayo kanye nokuzama kabusha indlela emzileni oyinhloko wakwa-Google
Indlela yokubuyela emuva evikelwe enokubuyekezwa okuphoqelekile ngaphambi kokugcinwa
Amazinga okuqukethwe afanayo kuzo zombili izindlela, eyisisekelo neyandisiwe

tiers.title: Ukuqinisekisa kanye Nomlando Wemvelaphi
tiers.description: Kutholakala izindlela ezengeziwe zokuhlola nokuqapha kanye nokunciphisa ubungozi kuyo yonke i-Blueprint, umbhalo (script), ukubuka kuqala (pre-vis), kanye nevidiyo yengxenye—kusetshenziswa uhlelo olufanayo lokunikeza udumo njengakwamanye amathuluzi e-Studio. Ama-clip aphumelelayo athola amarekhodi asayinwe aqinisekisa umsuka wokuqukethwe.
highlights: Izinkomba zokuqinisekisa okuqukethwe ngaphambi kokusebenzisa izinsiza eziningi ekukhiqizeni isithombe (rendering)
I-hash yokuqukethwe kanye nemethadatha yomthombo esayinwe ngedijithali kwingxenye yevidiyo
Amarekhodi okuhlola, ukulandelela ukwephulwa kwemithetho, kanye nokubika ukusetshenziswa kabi ukuze kuvikelwe inkundla

trustSafeguard.morNote: I-SceneFlow isebenza ngokwabelana ngemfanelo nozakwethu obhaliswe njengomthengisi (Merchant of Record): lokhu kuhlanganisa ukuphepha kwezinga eliphezulu okuvela ku-Google, kanye nezindlela zokuvikela nohlelo lokulandelela imisebenzi okuvela ku-SceneFlow—okunciphisa ubungozi kubadali nakunkundla ngokufanayo.

extendedScenes.title: Ngaphesheya kwevidiyo emfushane yemizuzwana eyisishiyagalombili
extendedScenes.subtitle: Dlulela ngale komkhawulo wesiqeshana esisodwa—qala ngokuvumela ukubukeka kwaso, bese welula isigcawu sakho kancane kancane sibe yizinkulumo zomuntu oyedwa, izincazelo, kanye nezingxenye zengxoxo ezihamba kahle.
extendedScenes.intro: I-SceneFlow ayithembisi ukukhiqiza okuqhubekayo okungenamkhawulo ngesikhathi esisodwa. Ihlela izingcezu zomculo ezinde njengochungechunge oluhleliwe: isiqeshana sokuqala esithatha imizuzwana engafika kwengu-8, kulandelwe izigaba zokwengeza eziqhubekayo zemizuzwana engu-7—kanye nokuvunywa kwengcezu yomculo kuqala ngaphambi kokuba usebenzise amakhredithi akho.

steps.title: Isiqeshana sokuqala sika-8s
steps.description: Ukuguqula uhlaka lube yividiyo noma isithombe sibe yividiyo kusuka ku-Beat Frames ogunyaziwe kukhiya ukwakheka ngaphambi kokuba kuqale ukunyakaza.

steps.title: Izinyathelo zokwelula ngo-+7s
steps.description: Isinyathelo ngasinye siqhubeka nge-engeli nangokunyakaza okufanayo—okulungele izingxoxo ezingaphazamiseki phakathi nesigqi esithile.

steps.title: Ukugunyazwa okubeka phambili ukudlula okulindelekile
steps.description: Imigqa emide ihlukana ngokuzenzakalelayo ngesikhathi sokubuyekezwa kokubukwa kwangaphambili (pre-vis). Uvumela amafreyimu ngaphambi kokuba uchungechunge lukhiqizwe—hhayi inqubo efana nokusebenza komshini wokugembula.

steps.title: Production Mixer qeda
steps.description: Izingxenye ezixhunyiwe zihlanganiswa ekudlalweni kwesigcawu; umsindo ovumelana nesimo ubamba ukulandisa okuqhubeka isikhathi eside kunevidiyo.

stats.label: Isigaba esijwayelekile sengxoxo (imizuzwana engu-8 + isandiso esingu-1)
Isigaba eside senkulumo yomlingiswa oyedwa (imizuzwana engu-8 + izandiso ezi-3)

extendedScenes.footnote: Ukulandelana kokunwetshwa (extension chains) kudinga indlela eyinhloko yokukhiqiza yakwa-Google kanye nezinkomba zevidiyo ezivumelekile phakathi kwezigaba (izinkomba ziphelelwa yisikhathi ngemva kwamahora angaba ngu-48). Isigaba ngasinye se-API sihlala ngaphakathi kwemingcele yesikhathi se-Veo—ubude obuphelele buvela ekuxhumaniseni izigaba, hhayi ekukhiqizeni okuqhubekayo okude okukodwa.

creativeRange.title: Zonke izitayela, zonke izikrini
creativeRange.subtitle: I-Blueprint yindawo lapho i-DNA yakho yobuciko izinzisa khona—isitayela sobuciko, isilinganiso sobukhulu besithombe (aspect ratio), umoya wendaba, kanye nomongo wayo. I-SceneFlow ifaka lezo zinqumo ohlelweni lokuqala lwendaba (treatment), ku-Audience Resonance, kanye nasekudalweni kombhalo (script) ukuze imiyalelo yezigcawu ihambisane nohlaka lwakho kanye nokubukeka okufunayo kusukela ekuqaleni—hhayi njengezilungiselelo zokugcina ngesikhathi sokukhiqiza umkhiqizo wokugcina.

pillars.title: Ukuma Kulandela Umsebenzi (kanye noHlaka)
pillars.description: Usayizi wesikrini unquma indlela yokuxoxa indaba ngokubonakalayo. Ifomethi emile engu-9:16 idinga ukuhlelwa kwendawo okuminyene, izindlela zokuheha izibukeli ezisheshayo, kanye nokuqondisa okugxile kakhulu ekuthathweni kwezithombe ezisondele kakhulu (close-ups)—okuhluke kakhulu endleleni yokuhlela izigcawu zesikrini esibanzi esingu-16:9. Khiya isilinganiso sobukhulu besithombe (aspect ratio) ku-Blueprint ukuze uhlelo lokubhala umbhalo wesiqondiso (script) lukwazi ukubhala imiyalelo yezigcawu ehambisana nobungako besikrini.

pillars.title: Isitayela sobuciko sinquma indlela yokubhala.
pillars.description: Ama-anime ohlobo lwe-Noir kanye nemikhiqizo ye-Pixar ye-3D kudinga izingxoxo, isimo, kanye nesivinini sokuhamba kwendaba okuhlukene. Khetha isitayela osifunayo ku-Blueprint, bese i-LLM ifaka lowo moya noma isitayela ngqo ekwakhekeni kombhalo (i-DNA yawo)—hhayi njengesihlungi esifakwa ngemuva kokuba umbhalo usuqediwe.

creativeRange.blueprintTagline: Ithoni kanye nendaba eyinhloko kuqedela uhlelo—i-Blueprint ingubuchopho; ukukhiqiza kungumsipha.

artStyles.subsectionIntro: Ukubukeka kwakho akuyona nje indlela yokuhlela isithombe esivele ikhona—kuwumoya wombhalo wakho. Misa isitayela sobuciko ku-Blueprint, bese zonke izigaba zilandela lowo mklamo.
artStyles.footnote: Kuqinisekiswe isisekelo sokubukwayo se-Blueprint—okwaqhubeka kulo lonke uhlelo kusukela kumbhalo, ukubuka kuqala (pre-vis), kuya ekukhiqizweni kokugcina (final render).

items.name: Okufana nesithombe
items.description: Isitayela sokuthatha izithombe esisezingeni lobungcweti
items.tagline: Umsebenzi wobuciko obukhulu nobunemininingwane eminingi obubonisa iqiniso
items.marketingBody: Isitayela esibukeka njengempilo yangempela (photorealism) siletha lokho okuthandwa yizithameli eziningi futhi okulindelekile ezinhlelweni ze-TV ezisezingeni eliphezulu kanye nakuma-documentary. Qinisekisa ukuthi abalingiswa nokukhanya kubukeka kungokoqobo kuzo zonke izigaba zendaba ezilandelanayo, ukuze imidlalo yochungechunge kanye nochungechunge lwama-documentary kugcine ukugeleza kwemizwa okungaguquki kusukela ekuqaleni kuze kube sekugcineni.

items.name: I-Anime (yeminyaka yama-1990)
items.description: Isitayela se-anime sakudala sama-90s
items.marketingBody: Isitayela sokufaka imibala esibizwa nge-*cel shading* (esivame ukusetshenziswa kuma-*anime*) sikhuthaza ukuzibandakanya okujulile kwabalandeli ochungechungeni lwevidiyo oluku-inthanethi kanye nezindaba ezinde neziqhubekayo. Izinhlelo zobuchwepheshe eziklanyelwe ukukhiqiza okuqukethwe ngale ndlela zikhiqiza imifanekiso enemicu ecacile kanye nokuhlelwa kwesithombe okuhleleke kahle — okuyizinto ezifanele kakhulu ekukhiqizeni uchungechunge olukhulu ngobuningi.

items.name: I-Pixar Animation
items.description: Izithombe ezinyakazayo ze-3D ngesitayela se-Pixar
items.marketingBody: Izimo eziyindilinga nezithambile kanye nokwakheka kwabalingiswa okukhombisa imizwa kudala umuzwa ofudumele obamba ababukeli isizini yonke. Lokhu kulungele kakhulu uchungechunge lwezithombe ezinyakazayo (animation), izinhlelo ezinde zemindeni, kanye nokuxoxwa kwezindaba okugqamisa uhlobo lomkhiqizo, lapho kubaluleke khona ukuthi abalingiswa bahlale bengaguquki kuzo zonke izigaba zendaba.

items.name: Ubuciko Bomqondo
items.description: Imidwebo yomqondo womdlalo/wefilimu
items.tagline: Izithombe eziyisisekelo zokubona ngeso lengqondo (pre-vis keyframes) zamafilimu nochungechunge, ezinezibani ezakha isimo esithile futhi ezikulungele ukusetshenziswa ekukhiqizeni.

items.name: Okufana nesitayela sikaGhibli
items.description: Kuphefumulelwe yi-Studio Ghibli
items.marketingBody: Lesi sitayela sithinta ngqo umkhankaso omkhulu wobuciko obubeka phambili umqondo wokuthi "Ubuciko Bezandla Buwubukhazikhazi." Ukwakheka okufana nokupenda ngamanzi (watercolor) kanye nezizinda ezibukeka njengemidwebo kudala imihlaba eyakhiwe ngesandla, lapho ukungapheleli kwemvelo kubonakala njengobuciko obuqondile kulo lonke uchungechunge olude.

items.name: Incwadi yamahlaya
items.description: Isitayela sokudweba ngoyinki samahlaya
items.tagline: U-inki ogqamile, ukwakheka okune-halftone, kanye nemibala ye-pop-art yezindaba ezilandiswa ngeziqephu eziningi.

items.name: Umsebenzi wobuciko wopende wamafutha
items.description: Umsebenzi wobuciko wopende kawoyela wesitayela sakudala
items.tagline: Indlela yakudala yokusebenzisa ibhulashi nemibala egqamile yezinhlelo ezinde ezigxile kumadokhumentari nakumlando.

items.name: Ubuciko bedijithali
items.description: Umfanekiso wedijithali wesimanje
items.tagline: Imifanekiso enesitayela esikhethekile yama-documentary anopopayi kanye nochungechunge lweziqephu ezichazayo.

items.name: Upende wamanzi
items.description: Umdwebo wamanzi othambile
items.tagline: Imibala ethambileyo yezindaba zokuphila, amafilimu okubhala ngamaqiniso, kanye nemibhalo emide egxile ekucabangisiseni.

items.name: Umdwebo/Umsebenzi wobuciko wemigqa
items.description: Isitayela sokudweba ngepensela
items.tagline: Imigqa enemininingwane nokwakheka okufana nokwepensela, okwenzelwe izigaba ezinde zomsebenzi kusukela esigabeni sokubona ngeso lengqondo kuya ekukhiqizweni.

outputFormats.subsectionIntro: Ukukhetha indlela yokubeka isithombe (framing) kuyingxenye yokulandisa indaba, hhayi nje into okumele uyikhethe lapho ukhipha umsebenzi. I-Blueprint inquma isilinganiso sobukhulu besithombe (aspect ratio) ngaphambi kokuba kubhalwe imiyalelo yokuqala yesigcawu.
outputFormats.resolutionFootnote: Kukhethwe ku-Blueprint; umbhalo kanye nesiqondiso sesigcawu kusekelwe kulolu hlaka. Khipha ngekhwalithi engu-720p noma 1080p lapho iphrojekthi yakho ikusekela khona lokho.

items.label: Isikrini esibanzi esingu-16:9
items.description: Ku-YouTube eyinhloko, ku-TV exhunywe ku-inthanethi, nakuchungechunge lweziqephu—i-Blueprint ibhala imiyalelo yezigcawu zesikrini esibanzi kanye nokuhlelwa kokuma kwabalingisi ukuze kwakhiwe isimo esifana nesefilimu.

items.label: 9:16 Omi mpo
items.description: Ezinhlelweni zedrama ezilandelanayo ezibukwa zime mpo kanye nochungechunge olwenzelwe amafoni—i-Blueprint ibhala izinhlelo zokuma kwabalingisi (blocking) ezifanele ukubukwa zime mpo, isivinini esisheshayo nesigxilile, kanye nokuqondisa okugxile ekuboniseni ubuso babalingisi eduze, okuyizinto ezilindelwe ngabantu abathanda ukuzibukela zilandelana ngokushesha (binge-watchers).

items.label: Isikwele esingu-1:1
items.description: Iziqeshana zeziqephu ezimise okwesikwele, amaqoqo ezingxoxo, kanye nezikhathi ezibalulekile ezikhethwe ochungechungeni olude — lokhu kuyingxenye eyodwa yemitapo yeziqephu eyenzelwe ngqo izinkundla zokuxhumana.

items.label: 4:3 Yakudala
items.description: Amamojuli okuqeqesha, amaqoqo amafilimu okubhala ngamaqiniso, kanye nezinhlaka ezifanele izethulo, lapho izethameli zakho zilindele isimo esijwayelekile sokwethulwa kokuqukethwe okude.

toolStack.title: Indlela Engalungile uma iqhathaniswa nendlela ye-SceneFlow
toolStack.subtitle: Kubakhiqizi abanolwazi: yekani ukuchitha amahora amaningi nikopisha futhi ninamathisela phakathi kwemibhalo, izithombe, imisindo, amavidiyo, umculo namathuluzi okuhlela. Kulabo abasha kumavidiyo e-AI: kukhona isitudiyo esisodwa esiqondisayo esenza yonke le nqubo ngokuzenzakalelayo, ukuze ukwazi ukuqeda umsebenzi wakho ngaphandle kokufunda izinhlelo zokusebenza eziyisithupha ezihlukene.

brokenWay.title: Indlela Ephukile
brokenWay.tagline: Okuhlukaniswe izingxenye. Okwenziwa ngesandla. Ividiyo yomshini wokugembula.

tools.name: Ukukhiqizwa kwezwi
tools.category: Ukukhipha nokurekhoda kabusha amazwi achazayo ngesandla

tools.name: Ukukhiqizwa kwamavidiyo
tools.category: Ukuzama kabusha komshini wokugembula — faka umyalo, khiqiza, ala, phinda

tools.name: Ukuhlela amavidiyo
tools.category: Ukuhlanganisa ngesandla, ukuthumela kwamanye amazwe, kanye nokucwengisiswa kwenqubo yokwandisa umthamo

brokenWay.chaosLabel: Amathebhu ayisithupha. Zama futhi uze uthole okusebenzayo.
painPoints: Ukukopisha nokunamathisela phakathi kwamathuluzi okukhiqiza nawokuhlela
Ukukhiqizwa kwamavidiyo ngendlela yomshini wokugembula — zama kaningi kuze kube yilapho kutholakala okusebenzekayo.
Ukukhathala ngenxa yemiyalelo kanye nemijikelezo yokukhiqiza kabusha
Akukho kuhlolwa kwezethameli ngaphambi kokuba uchithe imali.
Isiphithiphithi sezinguqulo kuzo zonke izinto ezithunyelwayo

sceneflowWay.title: Indlela ye-SceneFlow
sceneflowWay.tagline: Isitudiyo esisodwa. Ukuzenzakalela okuqondiswayo — noma ukukhiqiza okukhulu kakhulu uma usuwazi kakade uhlelo lobuchwepheshe obusetshenziswayo.
sceneflowWay.syncLabel: Ifayela lephrojekthi elilodwa — akukho ukushintshashintsha phakathi kwamathebhu
benefits: Izigaba eziqondiswayo — yeka ukushintshana phakathi kwamathebhu nokulahlekelwa umongo
Imvume ye-Pre-vis — misa ukuphinda udlale emshinini wemidlalo (slot machine) ngaphambi kokusebenzisa imali kuvidiyo.
Audience Resonance amaphuzu ngaphambi kokwenziwa kwesithombe okunzima
Inguqulo yokugcina elungele ukushicilelwa ngemizuzu engu-30–60, hhayi amahora angaphezu kwama-4

toolStack.comparisonCaption: Isitudiyo esisodwa sithatha indawo yamathuluzi okukhiqiza ahlukene, ukuphinda kukhiqizwe amavidiyo ngendlela engahleliwe (njengomshini wokugembula), kanye nokuhlanganisa ukuhlela okwenziwa ngesandla.
toolStack.comparisonImageAlt: Izindleko zokukhiqiza ngendlela evamile uma kuqhathaniswa nesitudiyo esisebenza ngokuzenzakalela — kusukela emcabangweni kuya kuvidiyo elungele ukushicilelwa ngokushesha okukhulu
toolStack.costNote: Izindleko ze-AI ziyafana, kodwa isikhathi esichithwa ngize sinciphile. Ukhokhela amamodeli noma ngabe kanjani — kungaba ngamakhredithi e-SceneFlow, i-akhawunti yakho yomhlinzeki, noma nge-BYOK. I-SceneFlow iqeda izindleko ezengeziwe zokuhlanganisa okuqukethwe ngokukopisha nokunamathisela, okukuvumela ukuthi ukhiqize futhi ukhiphe amavidiyo amaningi ngesabelomali esifanayo.
toolStack.proofLine: Kuqinisekiswe ohambweni lokuhlola indlu efakwe ohlwini: inqubo ephelele eyenziwa ngesandla ithatha amahora angaphezu kwama-4 → umphumela ofanayo usebenzisa i-SceneFlow uthatha isikhathi esingaphansi kwehora.

comparison.title: Isivinini sokukhiqiza ngaphandle kwezindleko ezengeziwe
comparison.subtitle: Thatha indawo yamathuluzi okukhiqiza okuqukethwe ahlukene kanye nokuhlanganisa ngesandla ngokusebenzisa isitudiyo esisodwa esisebenza ngokuzenzakalelayo — kusukela emcabangweni wokuqala kuya kumkhiqizo wokugcina osethulungele ukushicilelwa.
comparison.caption: Isikhungo esisodwa sithatha indawo yamathuluzi okufaka imiyalelo (prompts) ahlukene, ukuhlela ngesandla, kanye nokudluliselwa komsebenzi phakathi kwezinkundla eziningi.
comparison.imageAlt: Izindleko zokukhiqiza ngendlela evamile uma kuqhathaniswa nesitudiyo esisebenza ngokuzenzakalela — kusukela emcabangweni kuya kuvidiyo elungele ukushicilelwa ngokushesha okukhulu

howItWorks.title: Kusukela emcabangweni kuya kuvidiyo esilungele ukushicilelwa
howItWorks.subtitle: Uchungechunge aluphoqelekile. Indlela eyinhloko ithi Blueprint → Ukukhiqiza → Screening Room — okuhlanganisa i-pre-vis, i-animatic, ividiyo yesigcawu, kanye ne-master MP4 phakathi naleso sikhathi.
howItWorks.tagline: Isinyathelo ngasinye senziwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngobuchwepheshe obuphezulu. Isinyathelo ngasinye sikunikeza amandla aphelele okulawula.

phases.subtitle: Injini ye-Showrunner
phases.description: Chaza umhlaba wakho kanye bese udala izindaba ezihambisanayo ezihlanganisa iziqephu eziningi. Ukusebenzisa i-Reference Library ngokuhlanganyela kuqinisekisa ukuthi abalingiswa nesimo sendaba kuhlala kuhambisana kuso sonke isizini.
keySteps: Chaza umhlaba wendaba — abalingiswa, isimo sendaba, kanye nohlelo olukhulu lwesizini.
Khiqiza ngokuzenzakalelayo uhlaka lweziqephu zayo yonke isizini
Vumelanisa ne-Blueprint kanye nokukhiqizwa kwesiqephu ngasinye
keyFeatures: Chaza umhlaba wakho kanye kuphela — abalingiswa, isimo, kanye nohlelo lwendaba lwesizini.
Izinhlaka zeziqephu ezihleleke kahle — ezikhiqizwa ngokuzenzakalelayo kuso sonke isizini
Ukulandelela ukuqhubeka — ukuqinisekisa ukuthi iziqephu zezinkathi eziningi ziyahambisana
Ukuvumelanisa uchungechunge neziqephu — ku-Studio kanye nasekukhiqizeni kwe-Blueprint

phases.subtitle: Ukuthuthukiswa Kwendaba
phases.description: Guqula imiqondo ibe yizinhlaka ezihleliwe ezihlanganisa isifinyezo sendaba (logline), izigaba ezibalulekile (beats), abalingiswa, kanye nesimo sendaba (tone). Sebenzisa i-Audience Resonance futhi usebenzisane nabanye ngaphambi kokuqala inqubo enzima yokukhiqiza isithombe sokugcina (rendering).
keySteps: Audience Resonance ukuthola amaphuzu ngomgomo ongu-80+
Izixhumanisi zokwabelana zomhlanganyeli kanye nokukhipha amafayela (PDF, Doc, PPTX)
keyFeatures: Ukukhiqiza → Ukubuyekeza → Ukwenza ngcono okuqhubekayo → Ukuqala inqubo yokukhiqiza
Ukusuka emcabangweni kuya esakhiweni ngemizuzu — isifinyezo sendaba, izigaba ezibalulekile, abalingiswa, kanye nomoya wendaba
Ukuthola amaphuzu angu-80 noma ngaphezulu (okuyilitshe) ngaphambi kwesigaba sokukhiqiza (Production) Audience Resonance
Izixhumanisi zokwabelana zabahlanganyeli — ukuhlanganiswa kwemibono ukuze kwenziwe ukulungisa okuqondisiwe

phases.subtitle: Umbhalo oya ku-Screening Room
phases.description: Amathebhu athi "Script" kanye "Shoot" aqondisa inqubo kusukela ku-Foundation → Pre-Vis → Footage → Mixer kuya ku-Streams. Izindawo zokuhlola ngesigcawu ngasinye zinciphisa isidingo sokuphinda umsebenzi; i-Screening Room iphethe ukubuka kuqala, ukuhlanganisa, kanye nokushicilela.
keySteps: Qinisekisa umbhalo, amazwi, kanye nomsindo wesigcawu
Ukubuka kuqala (pre-vis) isigcawu ngesigcawu — igalari nokwabelana ukuze kubuyekezwe
Ithebhu ethi Shoot — Ukuqoshwa → I-Mixer → Imifudlana ngesigcawu
Screening Room — buka kuqala, hlanganisa inguqulo eyinhloko, shicilela
keyFeatures: Foundation — umbhalo, amazwi, umsindo wesigcawu, Audience Resonance
Ukubuka kuqala (Pre-Vis) — izinkomba, umsindo, kanye nezithombe ezibalulekile (beat frames) zesigcawu ngasinye, kanye nezixhumanisi zokwabelana
Qopha — Izithombe, i-Mixer, kanye nokusakaza ngaphandle kokuphuma endaweni yokukhiqiza.
Screening Room — ukubuka kuqala izigcawu, ukuhlanganisa okuyinhloko, ukukhombisa umphakathi, kanye nokushicilela ku-YouTube

phases.subtitle: Buka kuqala · Hlanganisa · Shicilela
phases.description: Indawo eyodwa yokugcina umsebenzi ngaphakathi kwesigaba Sokukhiqiza (Production): buka kuqala amavidiyo ezigcawu, hlanganisa imifudlana ibe yifayela elilodwa eliyinhloko le-MP4, qhuba ukubukiswa okungabiwa nabanye okuhlanganisa imininingwane yokuhlaziya, bese ushicilela ku-YouTube noma ukhiphe amaqoqo amafayela.
keySteps: Buka kuqala ukusakazwa kwezigcawu ezikhiqiziwe ngokulandelana
Hlanganisa inguqulo eyinhloko — khetha i-Animatic noma ividiyo yesigcawu ngasinye
Dala uhlelo lokuhlola bese wabelana ngesixhumanisi
keyFeatures: Ukudlalwa kwevidiyo yesigcawu — kulingisa isipiliyoni somsebenzisi (UX) sesidlali se-Pre-Vis kusetshenziswa imifudlana ekhiqiziwe
Izilungiselelo zokuhlanganisa ezichaziwe — Ividiyo yonke, okuxubile, noma ukuhlanganisa okwenziwe ngokwezidingo zesigcawu ngasinye
Ukuhlolwa okwabelwanayo — izixhumanisi ezinezikolo kanye nempendulo ehleliwe
Ingcweti ye-YouTube, ukukhiqizwa kwamavidiyo amafushane, kanye namaphakethe okusabalalisa

simpleWalkthrough.title: Kusukela emcabangweni kuya kuvidiyo esilungele ukushicilelwa
simpleWalkthrough.subtitle: Qala ngombono noma umbhalo, uthuthukise usebenzisa i-Blueprint ne-Audience Resonance, ubone ngeso lengqondo usebenzisa i-Pre-Vis, uqophe ividiyo yesigcawu, uhlole ku-Screening Room, bese ushicilela — konke lokhu kwenziwa esitudiyo esisodwa.
simpleWalkthrough.tagline: Isinyathelo ngasinye senziwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngobuchwepheshe obuphezulu. Isinyathelo ngasinye sikunikeza amandla aphelele okulawula.

steps.stepLabel: Qala ngomqondo wakho noma umbhalo okhona kakade.
steps.shortDescription: Qala ngomqondo obhalwe ngolimi olujwayelekile noma ufake umbhalo wakho wefilimu — Fountain, Final Draft, noma unamathisele umbhalo wakho.
steps.detailedDescription: I-SceneFlow yamukela imibono ngolimi olulula noma ngefomethi yombhalo wesikrini ehleliwe. Ubuchwepheshe be-AI busiza ekwandiseni imibono ukuze ibe yizinhlaka zendaba (treatments), futhi bungangenisa imibhalo yesikrini esivele ikhona ukuze ungaphinde uqale phansi ekhasini elingenalutho.
steps.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Ibhokisi lengxoxo lokufaka umqondo wephrojekthi entsha noma lokungenisa umbhalo (script)

steps.shortDescription: Guqula imibono ibe uhlaka oluhleliwe — okuhlanganisa isifinyezo esikhulu (logline), izigaba ezibalulekile zendaba (beats), abalingiswa, kanye nesimo semizwa — ngaphambi kokuqala umsebenzi onzima wokukhiqiza isithombe sokugcina (rendering).
steps.detailedDescription: I-Blueprint yakha uhlaka oluphelele lwendaba ngokuzenzakalelayo. Thuthukisa ukuthuthuka kwabalingiswa, izigaba zendaba, kanye nesimo sendaba ngokusebenzisa iziphakamiso ezihlakaniphile. Izixhumanisi zokwabelana nabanye zivumela abathintekayo ukuthi babuyekeze umsebenzi ngaphambi kwesigaba sokukhiqiza.

steps.stepLabel: Thuthukisa umbhalo wakho usebenzisa i-Audience Resonance
steps.shortDescription: Linganisela umbhalo wakho ngokuthi ufaneleka kangakanani ezithamelini oziqondisile, bese usebenzisa izincomo zesigcawu ngasinye ngokulungisa ngokushesha ngokuchofoza kanye.
steps.detailedDescription: I-Audience Resonance (AR) ihlaziya umbhalo wakho ngokujulile ngokubheka izethameli ozichazile. Thola amaphuzu ezinga lesigaba, izincomo ezingasetshenziswa, kanye ne-Guided Edits — sebenzisa izinguquko ngokuzenzakalelayo esigabeni ngasinye noma wenze izinguquko ezinkulu embhalweni wonke usebenzisa ibhokisi lezingxoxo le-AR.

steps.stepLabel: Bona ngeso lengqondo futhi uhlole ngokusebenzisa ukubona ngeso lengqondo kusengaphambili
steps.shortDescription: Khiqiza umsindo wengxoxo kanye nezithombe ezibonisa ukulandelana kwezigcawu (beat frames) ngokwezigcawu. Yabelana ngama-animatic ukuze uthole imvume ngaphambi kokusebenzisa imali yokugcina kwividiyo.
steps.detailedDescription: I-Pre-Vis Studio ikhiqiza izinkomba, umsindo, kanye nezithombe ezibonisa ukulandelana kwezenzo (beat frames) esigabeni ngasinye — okuyizigaba zokuhlola ezinciphisa isidingo sokuphinda umsebenzi obiza imali eningi uma kwenzeka kuba noshintsho kubalingiswa noma esimweni somoya wendaba. Yabelana ngesixhumanisi sokubuka ukuze nisebenzisane; i-animatic ephelele ingaba umkhiqizo wokugcina wamaphrojekthi amaningi.

steps.shortDescription: Dala ividiyo ehambisana nesigqi, hlanganisa umsindo nezendlalelo ezingaphezulu, bese ukhipha imifudlana yesigcawu esiphelele — konke lokhu (ama-footage, i-mixer, nemifudlana) kutholakala kuthebhu eyodwa ethi 'Shoot'.
steps.detailedDescription: Ithebhu ethi 'Shoot' engxenyeni yokukhiqiza (Production) iyindawo yakho yokusebenzela kusethi: yakha ividiyo kusuka ezithombeni ze-Pre-Vis ezigunyaziwe (Footage), ulungise kahle isikhathi, izimpawu zamanzi (watermarks), kanye nomsindo ku-Mixer, bese ukhiqiza amafayela e-MP4 aphelele ezigcawu ku-Streams.
subPoints: Izithombe ezinyakazayo — ukukhiqizwa kwevidiyo isinyathelo ngesinyathelo kusukela kuzinhlaka zokuqala nezokugcina ze-Pre-Vis
Isihlanganisi — uphawu lwamanzi, umbhalo obekwe phezu kwesithombe, kanye nesikhathi somsindo ngesigcawu ngasinye
Ama-Stream — ividiyo yesigcawu esiqediwe (zonke izigaba) elungele i-Screening Room

steps.stepLabel: Hlola uhlelo lwakho olusebenzayo usebenzisa i-Screening Room
steps.shortDescription: Buka kuqala amavidiyo ezigcawu ngokulandelana kwawo, hlanganisa ifayela eliyinhloko le-MP4, bese uhlela ukubukiswa okungabiwa nabanye kanye nokuqoqa imibono ehlelekile.
steps.detailedDescription: I-Screening Room ilingisa isipiliyoni somsebenzisi (UX) sesidlali se-Pre-Vis kodwa idlala imifudlana yezigcawu eseyenziwe (rendered). Khetha i-Animatic noma i-Video yesigcawu ngasinye, hlanganisa inguqulo eyinhloko, wabelane ngezixhumanisi zokubuyekeza, bese uhlela imibono enezikhathi ngaphambi kokushicilela.

steps.shortDescription: Sabalalisa inguqulo yakho yokugcina ku-YouTube, khipha iziqeshana ezimfushane, futhi ulandelele imininingwane mayelana nezithameli usuka endaweni eyodwa yokugcina umsebenzi.
steps.detailedDescription: Ukusuka ku-Screening Room, sebenzisa ithuluzi eliqondisa inqubo yokushicilela ku-YouTube, udale amafayela amafushane ezinkundla zokuxhumana, futhi ulande amaphakethe okusabalalisa. Imininingwane yokuhlaziya kanye nemibono yabahloli kuhlala endaweni eyodwa — akukho sidingo sokudlulisela umsebenzi kwamanye amathuluzi ahlukene.

useCases.title: Noma yiluphi uhlobo lwevidiyo ongayicabanga,
useCases.subtitle: Izinhlelo zokuzijabulisa nezabadali bokuqukethwe, imibukiso yezindlu nezakhiwo, ezemfundo, ama-podcast, izinhlobo zezinhlelo zezindaba, kanye nemikhankaso yemikhiqizo — isitudiyo esisodwa esisebenza ngokuzenzakalelayo, kusukela emcabangweni wokuqala kuya kumkhiqizo wokugcina osethulungele ukushicilelwa.
useCases.qualifyingStatement: I-SceneFlow iguqula izithombe zakho zokuqala, amafayela olayishiwe, kanye nezincazelo zibe amavidiyo abonisa indawo anencazelo ezwakalayo — okuhlanganisa inketho yokufaka izwi kanye nabalingiswa obalawulayo. Lezi yizethulo ezilungiswe ubuchwepheshe be-AI: ukuboniswa okungokoqobo okusekelwe ezintweni onazo, hhayi amavidiyo aqoshwe ngqo ngekhamera. Hlola futhi uvumele uhlaka ngalunye lokuboniswa (pre-vis) ngaphambi kokulushicilela; bhala imininingwane ecacile emikhiqizweni ukuze izethameli zazi ukuthi yini ezibukayo.

ui.frameAnchoredDescription: I-SceneFlow iwukuphela kwethuluzi elenza kube nokwenzeka ukugcina ukuhambisana okusekelwe kuzinhlaka (frame-anchored continuity), kuqinisekisa ukuthi umkhiqizo noma umlingiswa weklayenti lakho uhlala unjengoba unjalo kuzo zonke izingxenye zesigcawu.

challenge.title: Isithiyo Esihlobene Nezithombe Ezisekelayo ("B-Roll")
challenge.description: Unombhalo omuhle kakhulu, kodwa ukufunda amathuluzi ayisithupha ahlukene okudala nokuhlela — noma ukubhajwa emijikelezweni yamavidiyo ephindaphindeka ngokungapheli — kubambezela inqubo yokulayisha ividiyo ngayinye. Impumelelo yochungechunge lwamavidiyo ku-YouTube kanye nesivinini esidingekayo ezinhlelweni ezifana ne-YouTube TV kudinga ukuthi umsebenzi wenziwe ngokushesha okukhulu kunalokho okungenziwa ngamathuluzi e-AI ahlukene futhi angahlelekile.

solution.title: Umxoxi Wezindaba Ozisebenzelayo
solution.description: Khiqiza uchungechunge lweziqephu namavidiyo amafushane abamba amehlo usuka esitudiyweni esisodwa — kusukela ekwakhiweni kokuqala kokubonwayo okugxile ekuhlelweni kwezigcawu, ukuqinisekisa ukugeleza okuhlelekile kochungechunge, kuya ekulungiseni imikhiqizo yokugcina esilungele ukushicilelwa emkhakheni wabadali bokuqukethwe oholwa yi-YouTube.
features: Izithombe ezihambisana kahle nezigaba ezibalulekile zombhalo
Abalingiswa abaphambili abangaguquki kuzo zonke izigcawu
Khulisa umsebenzi ube uchungechunge lweziqephu usebenzisa umtapo wolwazi oyisisekelo owabiwayo.

creator.win: Shintsha usuke ekulayisheni okuvela ngezikhathi ezithile uye ohlelweni lokukhiqiza oluthembekile, oludinga umzamo noma izindlela ezingeziwe ezincane.

challenge.title: Umsebenzi Ongaqediwe Womhlinzeki kanye Nokuchezuka Kwesithunzi Somkhiqizo
challenge.description: Amaqembu ezokuxhumana, ezokuqeqesha nokuthuthukiswa kwabasebenzi (L&D), kanye nawokumaketha achitha amasonto elinde amavidiyo avela ezinkampanini zangaphandle — noma abhekane nenqwaba yamathuluzi adidayo ngaphandle kohlelo oluzinzile olungasetshenziswa ngaphakathi enkampanini. Yonke le migwaqo iholela ekungabini bikho kobunye obuqhubekayo ekumeleleni uhlobo lwenkampani (branding) kanye nokuma kwemikhankaso.

solution.title: Ukukhiqiza Ngaphakathi Esikhathini Esifanayo Seviki
solution.description: Yabela abasebenzi umsebenzi wokukhiqiza ividiyo ngaphakathi kwesabelomali esicacile samakhredithi — kusetshenziswa izifanekiso zomkhiqizo, kutholakala imvume ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa kwenguqulo yokugcina, futhi kungabikho zindleko zezinsuku zabasebenzi noma izigaba zokuhlela ezingenamkhawulo wesikhathi.
features: Faka esikhundleni sokusebenzisa abahlinzeki bangaphandle ukuthatha izithombe noma amavidiyo, izinqubo zangaphakathi eziqondiswayo.
Izifanekiso nemitapo yolwazi ehambisana nemigomo yomkhiqizo
Ukubonakala kokusetshenziswa kwekhredithi kanye nemikhawulo yesabelomali ngephrojekthi ngayinye
Vumela uhlaka lokuqala lwevidiyo ngaphambi kokukhokhela ividiyo yokugcina.

team.win: Khipha izinto zokuqeqesha, ezokuxhumana namavidiyo emikhankaso ngokohlelo lwakho — hhayi ngokulinda uhlu lwemisebenzi engakaqedwa yomhlinzeki.

challenge.title: Izixazululo Eziklanyelwe Imikhakha Ethile, Akukho Sis-temu Esiphindekayo
challenge.description: Amakhasimende abhekene nezindaba zempilo (memoirs), ukulondoloza ifa, ezindlu nomhlaba, kanye nezemfundo adinga imisebenzi eqedwa ngokushesha — kodwa iphrojekthi ngayinye iqala phansi sha. Ukudluliselwa komsebenzi ngamunye kanye nokubuyekezwa okuphindaphindwayo — okufana nokudlala imishini yokugembula — okuthinta imibhalo, izithombe, amazwi, amavidiyo, umculo namathuluzi okuhlela, kunciphisa kakhulu inzuzo etholakala emsebenzini omningi.

solution.title: Guqula Insizakalo Yakho Yamavidiyo Ibe Umkhiqizo
solution.description: Yakha izinqubo zomsebenzi eziphindaphindekayo zezitudiyo ezikhiqiza izindaba zempilo (memoirs) kanye nemikhakha ekhethekile yebhizinisi. Lokhu kubandakanya ukulayishwa kwama-template, ukwenziwa kwamakhophi amazwi, ama-avatar, kanye nokuvunywa kwemibono ngaphambi kokukhiqiza — yenza izinguquko ngokwezidingo zekhasimende ngalinye futhi wandise inzuzo ngokwandisa ivolumu yomsebenzi.
features: Izifanekiso zezindaba zempilo ezinezinketho zokulayisha izithombe, ukulingisa amazwi, kanye nezinhlamvu ezibonakalayo ezethula okuqukethwe.
Ukwamukelwa kwamakhasimende okuhambisana ne-Blueprint kanye nezigaba zokugunyazwa kwangaphambi kokuvakashela
Amaphakethe esitudiyo angenalo uphawu lomkhiqizi (white-label) wamavidiyo agcina umlando, awokuhlonipha abantu, kanye nawokubhaliselwa
Inzuzo kuma-credit esikhundleni sezindleko ezengeziwe zokuqopha ngakunye

productionShop.win: Qala ibhizinisi lokwenza amavidiyo alondoloza izinkumbulo noma insizakalo ekhethekile yesitudiyo ehlinzekwa ngendlela ephindaphindekayo — hhayi umsebenzi wesikhashana owenziwa kanye kuphela.

challenge.description: Ukunqoba isethulo sephrojekthi (pitch) kuyingxenye nje yomsebenzi. Imisebenzi yamakhasimende ephindaphindekayo idinga ukwenziwa ngokushesha — kodwa ukudluliselana umsebenzi kanye nokuzama ukuphinda ukhiqize ividiyo kaningi usebenzisa amathuluzi ahlukene okudala nokuhlela, kwenza inqubo yonke ihambe kancane.

solution.title: Umkhiqizo Ophumayo + Ukugunyazwa Kwamakhasimende
solution.description: Shintsha usuke esigabeni sokwethula imibono uye ekukhiqizeni okuqhubekayo, usebenzisa izindlela zokulawula eziqinisekisa ukuphepha komkhiqizo, ukubuyekezwa kwamakhasimende ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa komsebenzi wokugcina, kanye nezindleko zamakhredithi ezibikezelekayo ngomsebenzi ngamunye.
features: Ukubona kuqala ngokushesha ngenhloso yezethulo kanye nokuthola imvume yekhasimende
Izifanekiso ezingasetshenziswa kabusha zamafomethi amakhasimende aphindaphindekayo
Ukubonakala kwesabelomali kuzo zonke izigaba zokuguqulwa

agency.win: Feza izinqubo zokwethula amaphrojekthi kanye nomsebenzi wamakhasimende oqhubekayo ngokushesha okukhulu, unciphise ubungozi bokukhiqiza futhi wandise inzuzo.

challenge.title: Ukulungiselela ukubona ngeso lengqondo (pre-visualization) okuhamba kancane ngaphambi kokuba uhlole indaba
challenge.description: Unayo imibhalo yefilimu — kodwa ukufundwa kwayo ngokuhlanganyela, izigaba zokudala imidwebo yezigcawu (storyboards), kanye namathuluzi okubuka kuqala (previz) angahlelekile kahle kubambezela ukwethulwa kweprojekthi kubatshali-zimali, ukuhlolwa kwayo phambi kwezethameli, kanye nezinqumo zokuyivumela ukuthi iqhubeke.

solution.title: Ukubona Ngeso Lengqondo Kwangaphambili Okusebenzisanayo Okusekelwe Kumbhalo
solution.description: Layisha umbhalo wakho (we-MDX, FDX, nezinye izinhlobo zamafayela), uwuthuthukise usebenzisa i-Audience Resonance, bese udala uhlaka olubonakalayo olusebenzisanayo (pre-vis) ukuze uluhlole — konke lokhu kwenziwa ngokushesha nangokuhambisana kwezigaba ezahlukene (beats), ngezinketho zezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 kanye nokufakwa kwezilimi eziningi ngokushesha.
features: Layisha futhi ungenise imibhalo yamafilimu (MDX, FDX, nokunye)
Uhla lwezithombe ezinyakazayo zokuqala (animatic) ukuze kubuyekezwe futhi kutholakale imvume kwababambe iqhaza
Izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 ezinezendlalelo zezilimi eziningi ezisheshayo
Buyekeza bese ukhipha umbhalo (i-MDX namanye amafomethi)
Screening Room yokuhlola i-animatic ephelele nababukeli

filmProduction.win: Qinisekisa ukuthi indaba nezethameli kuyahambisana ngaphambi kokuqala ukuthatha izithombe ezisemqoka — usebenzisa i-animatic engabelwana ngayo, hhayi inqubo yokwenza uhlaka lokuqala (previz) ethatha amasonto amaningi.

categories.title: Uchungechunge Lokuzijabulisa Nabadali
categories.qualifyingStatement: I-YouTube manje isincintisana ne-TV yakudala ekuheheni izithameli—izinkampani ezizimele zokwenza izithombe eziphilayo (animation) kanye nabadali abazimele bakhiqiza uchungechunge oludumile oluthola izigidi eziningi zokubukwa esiqeshini ngasinye. I-SceneFlow ikunikeza ukubuka kuqala okugxile ekulandelaneni kwezigigaba (beat-first pre-vis), ukuqinisekisa ukuhambisana kwezinto (continuity) nge-Reference Library, kanye nemikhiqizo yokugcina esilungele ukushicilelwa emkhakheni wabadali—hhayi amathuluzi alula okusika amavidiyo afana nemishini yokugembula.

examples.label: Umdlalo we-TV ku-YouTube
examples.description: Cabanga ngokushicilela uchungechunge lwedrama olune-format engu-16:9 ku-YouTube—lapho i-YouTube manje isilawula u-13.4% wokubukwa kwe-TV e-U.S. kanti ngaphezu kuka-35% wesikhathi sokubuka wenzeka kuma-TV axhunywe ku-inthanethi. I-SceneFlow isiza abadali ukuthi bandise leso sabelo ngokuqukethwe okuhlukile nokuthakazelisayo: ukubona ngeso lengqondo kusengaphambili okugxile ezigabeni zendaba (beat-first pre-vis), ukuqinisekisa ukuhambisana kwezinto (continuity), kanye namafayela okugcina asezingeni eliphezulu (masters) alungele ukushicilelwa nge-widescreen.

examples.label: Uchungechunge Lwezithombe Ezinyakazayo Ku-inthanethi
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulungisa izinhlamvu eziklanywe ngesitayela esithile ku-Reference Library kanye kuphela—bese ukhipha iziqephu ezilandelanayo ezibukeka njenge-anime, i-Pixar, noma isitayela sika-Ghibli, ngokuzinza okufunwa yimisebenzi ephumelelayo ezimele (indie hits) efana ne-Glitch Productions.

examples.label: Uchungechunge lwe-YouTube oluneziqephu
examples.description: Cabanga ngohlelo olwakha ngokuzenzakalelayo ukulandelana kwezenzakalo zesizini ku-Series Studio—lapho imininingwane eyinhloko yeziqephu ivumelaniswa khona ne-Blueprint kanye neSigaba Sokukhiqiza, ukuze ubuso, izwi, kanye nesigqi sendaba kuhlale kuhambisana kahle kulo lonke uhlelo lwesiteshi esikhulayo.

examples.label: Uhlelo Olungokoqobo kanye Nomncintiswano Wabadali
examples.description: Cabanga ukukhiqiza imincintiswano yabadali boqukethwe esezingeni lezinhlelo ze-reality ngaphandle kwethimba lokusakaza—kuhlanganise nokusebenzisa amakhamera amaningi, ukubuyekezwa ngabathintekayo, kanye nokuyiqeda yonke inqubo—kusukela embhalweni kuya kufayela lokugcina le-MP4—esikhathini esingaphansi kwesonto.

examples.label: Idrama Yeselula Emi Mpo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokuqukethwe okukhangayo okusezingeni eliphezulu (okufana nesithombe sangempela) ngesilinganiso esingu-9:16 kanye neziqephu ezilandelanayo ezenzelwe ukubukwa kumakhalekhukhwini ngenkathi upheqa—vumela i-Beat Frames ngaphambi kokuba kwenziwe umkhiqizo wokugcina, bese uhlanganisa izici ezengeziwe ezikhangayo ukuze udale imizwa emisa umsebenzisi ukuthi aqhubeke nokupheqa. I-SceneFlow ikhiqiza amafayela ayinhloko ami mpo (vertical) alungele i-YouTube Shorts kanye nokuqukethwe okubonakala ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kumakhalekhukhwini.

categories.title: Izakhiwo, Izindawo kanye Nokwamukela Izivakashi
categories.qualifyingStatement: Yakhiwe kusetshenziswa izithombe zangempela zendawo yakho — yethulwa njengohambo oluqondiswayo olwenziwe ngobuchwepheshe be-AI, olusebenzisa izwi lakho kanye nesithombe sakho sedijithali (i-avatar). Lokhu kunikeza umbono ongokoqobo wokwakheka nezici zendawo, kodwa akuthathi indawo yokuyivakashela mathupha. Lonke uhambo lunemibhalo ecacile echazayo.

examples.label: Izindlu Zokuhlala
examples.description: Cabanga nje ngokulayisha izithombe zempahla yakho kanye nesithombe sakho nozwelo lwezwi lakho osekuvele kugciniwe. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha ividiyo yobungcweti ebonisa indlu ngaphakathi, equkethe isithombe nezwi lakho — ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Izakhiwo Zezohwebo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha amapulani esakhiwo, izithombe ezibonisa ukuthi sizobukeka kanjani, kanye nolwazi ngendawo, kanye nezwi elirekhodiwe nesithombe esimele umthengisi wakho (i-avatar). Bese udala ngokushesha izethulo ezibonisa indawo ukuze uhehe abatshalizimali — okwenza yonke ingxenye yendawo ibonakale sengathi ingokoqobo — futhi konke lokhu kutholakala ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Ukuqashisa kwesikhashana
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zendlu kanye nemininingwane ngezinsiza ezitholakalayo, kuhambisana nokuqoshwa kwezwi lomnikazi wendawo. Bese ushicilela ngokushesha amavidiyo edijithali okwamukela izivakashi, abingelela isivakashi ngasinye ngolimi lwaso — ngaphambi kokuba zifike zibhalise ukungena.

examples.label: Ezokwamukela Izivakashi Nezokuvakasha
examples.description: Cabanga nje ngokulayisha izithombe zehhotela kanye namaphuzu avelele ohambo, usebenzisa izwi lomamukeli kanye nesithombe esimele umuntu (avatar) okuyingxenye yohlobo lwakho lwebhizinisi. Bese uthumela ngokushesha izinkambo ezibonakalayo kanye nemihlahlandlela yohambo echazwa ngezwi ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 — konke lokhu ngaphandle kokudinga ithimba lokuthatha amavidiyo endaweni ngayinye.

examples.label: Abaqondisi Bemnyuziyamu Nemibukiso Yobuciko
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zemibukiso kanye namanothi omphathi wemibukiso njengoba imibukiso ishintsha. Bese uvuselela ngokushesha izinkambo eziqondiswayo ngezwi ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 — ngaphandle kokudinga ukuphinda uthathe izithombe lapho umbukiso ushintsha.

examples.label: Imfundo eyisisekelo (K-12) kanye nemfundo ephakeme
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izinto zokufunda ezihlanganisa izwi lomfundisi wakho elirekhodiwe kanye nesimo sakhe esibonakalayo. Bese udala ngokushesha izigaba eziphelele zezifundo abafundi bakho be-ESL kanye nabasemakampasini omhlaba wonke abangazibuka ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Ukufunda Nokuthuthukiswa Kwabasebenzi Ezinkampanini
examples.description: Cabanga ulayisha amaslayidi okuqeqesha aqukethe izwi lomphathi wakho wezokuthuthukisa abasebenzi (L&D) elirekhodiwe. Bese ushicilela ngokushesha amavidiyo emojuli—uhlanganisa izingxenye ezengeziwe zemizuzwana engu-7 ukuze kwakhiwe izifundo ezinde ezichazayo, futhi uvumele i-Beat Frames ngaphambi kokuba ividiyo yakhiwe ngokuphelele (render).

examples.label: Izifundo zeSoftware ye-SaaS
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zesikrini (screenshots) ze-UI njengezithombe eziyisisekelo, kanye nokuqoshwa kwezwi lochwepheshe bomkhiqizo wakho. Bese udala ngokushesha amavidiyo achazayo abonisa ukusebenza kohlelo — okuhlala kubuyekezwa ngosuku olwethulwa ngalo i-UI yakho.

examples.label: Ukufundisa Amakhono Akhethekile
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe ezikhombisa izinyathelo kanye nomsindo womqeqeshi wakho oqoshiwe kanye nesibonelo sokubukeka kwakhe. Bese ushicilela ngokushesha uchungechunge lwezifundo ezisezingeni eliphezulu — kungaba ezokupheka, ezokuzenzela izinto (DIY), noma ezokulungiselela izivivinyo zezitifiketi — ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Imfundo Yezokwelapha/Yeziguli
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha imidwebo yezinqubo zokwelapha kanye nokuqoshwa kwezwi likachwepheshe wakho kwezokwelapha okugciniwe futhi okugunyaziwe. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha amavidiyo acacile okufundisa iziguli, imindeni engawaqonda ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

examples.label: Izinkumbulo Ezirekhodwe Ngevidiyo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zomndeni, umsindo wezingxoxo, kanye namanothi ezigcawu kanye nezwi lomlandisi elirekhodiwe. Bese udala ngokushesha amavidiyo ezinkumbulo ahlukaniswe ngezahluko — futhi uvumele uhlaka lokuqala (pre-vis) ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa kwevidiyo yokugcina.

examples.label: Izindaba Zendawo Ethile
examples.description: Cabanga nje ngokulayisha izithombe nezindaba zanamuhla usebenzisa izwi lomethuli wezindaba elirekhodiwe. Bese ushicilela ngokushesha izindaba ezimfushane zansuku zonke zomphakathi — ngaphandle kwethimba lokuthatha amavidiyo noma ukwehluleka ukuhambisana nesikhathi esibekiwe.

examples.label: Izifinyezo Zezimali Nezemakethe
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha imininingwane yemakethe nezithombe zamashadi njalo ekuseni kanye nezwi lomhlaziyi wakho elirekhodiwe. Bese ukuguqula lokho ngokushesha kube wumhlahlandlela obonakalayo ohambisana nencazelo yezwi — okuba sekulungele ngaphambi kokuba kuvulwe imakethe.

examples.label: Ukuhlaziywa kwezemidlalo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izibalo zomdlalo nezithombe kanye nezwi lomhlaziyi wakho elirekhodiwe. Bese udala ngokushesha amavidiyo afingqa umdlalo aqukethe izithombe ezinyakazayo — ashicilelwa ngesikhathi abalandeli besaxoxa ngawo.

examples.label: Amadokhumentari Obugebengu Bangempela Nawakudala
examples.description: Cabanga ngokugcina izithombe zabantu abavelele emlandweni ku-Reference Library yakho kanye kuphela. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha iziqephu eziningi lapho ubuso nezwi ngalinye kuhlala kungashintshi — ochungechungeni olulodwa ngemva kolunye.

examples.label: Izaziso Zesimo Sezulu Nezezimo Eziphuthumayo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha imiyalezo ephuthumayo usebenzisa izwi elirekhodiwe nelithembekile lenhlangano yakho. Bese usakaza ngokushesha izixwayiso ezicacile ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 ezinkundleni zokuxhumana — konke lokhu kwenzeka ngemizuzu, hhayi ngezinsuku.

examples.label: Amavidiyo achaza ngemikhiqizo
examples.description: Cabanga ulayisha izithombe zemikhiqizo kanye nezwi lomethuli kanye ne-avatar okugcinwe kuhlelo lomkhiqizo wakho. Bese udala ngokushesha uchungechunge lwamavidiyo achazayo asezingeni le-cinema — vumela kuqala uhlaka oluyisibonelo (pre-vis) ngaphambi kokukhiqiza ividiyo yokugcina.

examples.label: Ucwaningo Lwesimo/Ubufakazi
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zobuso bamakhasimende, izithombe zephrojekthi, kanye nemininingwane yempumelelo uhlanganise nalokho nezwi lomlandisi elivele lilondoloziwe. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha izethulo ezisezingeni eliphezulu ezibonisa impumelelo — ngaphandle kokudinga ukuqopha amakhasimende ekhuluma ngomsebenzi owenziwe.

examples.label: Ukuqasha kanye Nokwakha Isithunzi Somkhiqizo
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe zehhovisi kanye nezici ezibalulekile zesiko lenkampani, kanye nezwi elirekhodiwe nesithombe esimele umuntu (avatar) womqashi wakho. Bese unikeza abafuna umsebenzi ithuba lokubona ngokushesha ukuthi usuku olujwayelekile emsebenzini lunjani — konke lokhu kwenziwa ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 ukuze kuqashwe abantu emhlabeni jikelele.

examples.label: Ukukhushulwa Kwemihlangano Nemicimbi
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha imininingwane ngabakhulumeli, imininingwane yezikhathi zohlelo, kanye nezithombe zendawo yomcimbi, konke kuhambisana nezwi lomphathi womcimbi eliqoshiwe. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha izethulo zabakhulumeli kanye nemihlahlandlela echaza lokho okulindelekile — okubuyekezwa njalo uma uhlelo lushintsha.

examples.label: Imibiko Yemithelela Yezinhlangano Ezingekho Ngaphansi Kukahulumeni (NGOs)
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izithombe ezithathwe enkundleni kanye nemininingwane ngomthelela womsebenzi, uhlanganise nalokho izwi lomuntu okhulumayo eliqoshiwe lenhlangano yakho. Bese uguqula ngokushesha imibiko yabanikeli ibe ngamavidiyo athinta inhliziyo futhi anezwi elichazayo — kuvele izwi elimele umsebenzi wenu, hhayi nje uchungechunge lwezithombe eziboniswayo.

examples.label: Izimemezelo Zezempilo Yomphakathi
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha imiyalezo yezempilo egunyaziwe usebenzisa izwi lomnyango wakho elithembekile nelirekhodiwe. Bese ufinyelela ngokushesha kuwo wonke umphakathi ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70 — ngokucaca okufanayo, ngokuphuthuma okufanayo, nangaphandle kokubambezeleka ngenxa yokuhumusha.

examples.label: Izincazelo ngezindaba zomthetho nomshuwalense
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha izifinyezo zezinkontileka nemidwebo yezinqubo kanye nezwi lomeluleki wakho elirekhodiwe. Bese ukhiqiza ngokushesha izincazelo ezibonakalayo amakhasimende azizwa eqonda ngempela — ngaphambi kokuba asayine noma afake isimangalo.

examples.label: Izimfundiso Zenkolo Nezingokomoya
examples.description: Cabanga ngokulayisha amanothi ezintshumayelo noma imibhalo engcwele ehambisana nezwi kanye nokuba khona kukathisha wakho okurekhodiwe. Bese ushicilela ngokushesha uchungechunge lwamavidiyo ansuku zonke oluqhubekayo lwamabandla emhlabeni jikelele — ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-70.

platformWalkthrough.title: Incazelo enemininingwane yokusetshenziswa kwenkundla
platformWalkthrough.subtitle: Nweba ukuze ubuke amavidiyo aqondisayo mayelana nokuhlelwa kochungechunge, ukugcinwa kokuvumelana kwezinkomba, ukujula kokukhiqizwa, i-Screening Room, kanye nokwethenjwa nokuphepha — okuhloselwe abahloli bezobuchwepheshe kanye nalabo abafuna ukuhlaziya ngokujulile.
platformWalkthrough.subheading: Ukubheka ngaphakathi — amavidiyo aqondisayo abahloli bezobuchwepheshe
platformWalkthrough.chapterHint: Nweba ukuze uhlanganise ukuhlelwa kochungechunge, ukuqhubeka kokubhekisela emuva, ukujula kokukhiqiza, kanye nokwethenjwa nokuphepha.

chapters.label: Qala lapha — uhlelo, ukuqhubeka, kanye nokufaneleka kubalaleli
Khiqiza bese ushicilela — Ithebhu ethi Shoot ku-Screening Room

beatFirst.title: Inqubo Yokukhiqiza Ividiyo Eqala Ngesigqi
beatFirst.description: Vumela izigaba ze-pre-vis kanye ne-Beat Frames ngaphambi kwe-F2V — lokhu kunciphisa ukwenziwa kabusha okungenanjongo okubangelwa amaphutha ohlelo (njengokuzidaleela imininingwane engalungile noma ukuchezuka embonweni wokuqala). Indlela eyodwa ehlelekile kusukela ekubuyekezweni kuya esiqeshini sokugcina.
keyFeatures: Express Pre-vis ukuze kubuyekezwe — yabelana ngama-beat ngaphambi kokwenza i-render enzima
Beat Frames ukwakheka kokukhiya — Reference Library ukuqhubeka
I-F2V ngesigqi ngasinye — khiqiza ividiyo kusuka kuzinhlaka ezivunyiwe
Uchungechunge oluqhubekayo lwe-EXT — izinyathelo ze-native +7s zezingxoxo ezinde ngaphakathi kwesigqi
Isikhathi sokuxuba kanye nemifudlana — vula i-Screening Room ukuze uhlanganise futhi ushicilele
beatFirst.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Beat Frames kanye nokuvunywa kokubuka kuqala ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa kwevidiyo
beatFirst.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engama-30: Ukuvuma imiculo, ukukhiya amafreyimu, bese kukhiqizwa iziqeshana ze-F2V.

screeningRoom.title: Screening Room
screeningRoom.description: Buka kuqala amavidiyo ezigcawu, hlanganisa inguqulo yokugcina, bese ushicilela — konke lokhu kwenziwa ngaphakathi esigabeni sokukhiqiza (Production). Thumela izixhumanisi eziyimfihlo kwababambe iqhaza ukuze bathumele imibono ehlelekile, kanye nokukhetha ukuthola imininingwane ehlaziya indlela abasebenzisana ngayo nokuqukethwe.
keyFeatures: Ukubuka kuqala kwevidiyo yesigcawu — dlala imifudlana ekhiqiziwe ngokulandelana
Ukuhlanganiswa kokugcina — khetha i-Animatic noma ividiyo yesigcawu ngasinye bese ukhiqiza ifayela elilodwa le-MP4.
Ukuhlolwa okungabiwa nabanye — izixhumanisi eziphephile ezihlanganisa ukunikezwa amaphuzu kanye nokuhlelwa kwempendulo
Shicilela — I-wizard ye-YouTube, ukukhiqizwa kwamavidiyo amafushane, kanye namaphakethe okusabalalisa
screeningRoom.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Iphaneli yokuhlaziya kanye nempendulo yomhloli ye-Screening Room
screeningRoom.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engu-30: Ukubamba umhlangano wokubuyekeza kanye nokuqoqa imininingwane mayelana nokubamba iqhaza

items.title: Uhluzi lweplathifomu
items.description: Isitudiyo esisodwa esenza yonke into, kusukela emcabangweni kuya kuvidiyo esilungele ukushicilelwa. Kusetshenziswa inqubo efanayo yokuqeqesha, ama-podcast, izindaba, kanye nochungechunge lwamafilimu — vumela ukubuka kuqala (pre-vis) ngaphambi kokusebenzisa imali ekukhiqizweni kokugcina.
keyFeatures: Uchungechunge → Blueprint → Ukukhiqiza → Screening Room
Ukugunyazwa okusekelwe ezigabeni (beat-first) — i-pre-vis kanye ne-Beat Frames ngaphambi kwe-F2V
Ukukhiqizwa kwe-Google Vertex AI kusetshenziswa amaketanga okwandisa (extension chains) e-Veo angaphakathi ohlelweni
Izindlela zokuqinisekisa ukuphepha nokwethembeka kanye nobufakazi obuqinisekisiwe bemvelaphi ngesikhathi sokulethwa
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Isithombe esikhulu sasekuqaleni (hero image) + umugqa ochaza inqubo ngendlela elula
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esingu-01:30: Hero → iphrojekthi entsha → Blueprint → Ukuthatha Izithombe/Amavidiyo → Screening Room → Shicilela

items.title: Ukuzenzakalela Kochungechunge
items.description: Chaza umhlaba wakho kanye bese udala izindaba ezihambisanayo ezihlanganisa iziqephu eziningi. Ukusebenzisa i-Reference Library ngokuhlanganyela kuqinisekisa ukuthi abalingiswa nesimo sendaba kuhlala kuhambisana kuso sonke isizini.
keyFeatures: Chaza umhlaba wakho kanye kuphela — abalingiswa, isimo, kanye nohlelo lwendaba lwesizini.
Izinhlaka zeziqephu ezihleleke kahle — ezikhiqizwa ngokuzenzakalelayo kuso sonke isizini
Ukulandelela ukuqhubeka — ukuqinisekisa ukuthi iziqephu zezinkathi eziningi ziyahambisana
Ukuvumelanisa uchungechunge neziqephu — ku-Studio kanye nasekukhiqizeni kwe-Blueprint
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Uhlolojikelele lochungechunge kanye nezinhlaka zeziqephu ezikhiqizwe ngokuzenzakalelayo
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engama-30: Umqondo owandiswa ube yisizini eneziqephu eziningi

items.title: Blueprint Ukusebenza Ngemishini
items.description: Guqula imiqondo ibe yizinhlaka ezihleliwe ezihlanganisa isifinyezo sendaba (logline), izigaba ezibalulekile (beats), abalingiswa, kanye nesimo sendaba (tone). Sebenzisa i-Audience Resonance futhi usebenzisane nabanye ngaphambi kokuqala inqubo enzima yokukhiqiza isithombe sokugcina (rendering).
keyFeatures: Ukukhiqiza → Ukubuyekeza → Ukwenza ngcono okuqhubekayo → Ukuqala inqubo yokukhiqiza
Ukusuka emcabangweni kuya esakhiweni ngemizuzu — isifinyezo sendaba, izigaba ezibalulekile, abalingiswa, kanye nomoya wendaba
Ukuthola amaphuzu angu-80 noma ngaphezulu (okuyilitshe) ngaphambi kwesigaba sokukhiqiza (Production) Audience Resonance
Izixhumanisi zokwabelana zabahlanganyeli — ukuhlanganiswa kwemibono ukuze kwenziwe ukulungisa okuqondisiwe
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: I-Blueprint ekhiqizwe ngokuzenzakalelayo equkethe izigaba ezibalulekile zendaba kanye nokuguquka kwabalingiswa
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engama-30: Ukuguqula umqondo ube yi-Blueprint ehleliwe

items.title: Kwabelwane nge-Reference Library ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa ukuqhubeka
items.description: Qinisekisa ukuthi abalingiswa, izingubo, amazwi, izindawo, kanye nezinto ezisetshenziswayo kuhlala kungaguquki kuzo zonke izigcawu neziqephu ngokusebenzisa izinkomba ezingasetshenziswa kabusha.
keyFeatures: Amaphrofayili angasetshenziswa kabusha — abalingiswa, izingubo, amazwi, izindawo, kanye nezinsiza-kusebenza
Ukusetshenziswa ezimweni ezahlukene — izinkomba zigelezela esizukulwaneni ngasinye
Ukufana okubonakalayo — ubuso obufanayo kanye nesimo esifanayo emiphumeleni yakwa-Imagen ne-Veo
Ukuqhubeka okuhambisana nohlelo olukhulu — okwakhelwe uchungechunge oluneziqephu eziningi
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Umtapo wolwazi wokubhekisela okhombisa ukuqhubeka okufanele kwabalingiswa nezinto ezisetshenziswayo.
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engama-30: Ukusebenzisa izinkomba ezigabeni eziningi

items.title: Audience Resonance Ukuhlaziya
items.description: Thola izethameli zakho ukuze uthole amaphuzu, ukuhlaziya, kanye nezincomo ngokushesha. Sebenzisa izindlela zokulungisa ezilula (ngokuchofoza kanye) noma usebenzise amathuluzi okuhlela aqondiswayo ukuze uthuthukise kahle kakhulu iziqephu zakho, Blueprint, kanye nombhalo ukuze uthole umphumela omuhle kakhulu.
keyFeatures: Ukulinganisa izethameli eziqondisiwe — kanye nokuhlukaniswa ngokwezigaba
Izincomo ezihlobene nezigaba — lungisa ingxenye efanele yendaba yakho
Ukulungisa ngokuchofoza kanye nokuhlela okuqondiswayo — ukubhala kabusha okunembile, hhayi ukuqagela
Umkhawulo wokulungela ukukhiqizwa — yazi ukuthi kufanele utshale nini emsebenzini wokugcina wokuhlinzeka isithombe (full render)
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: I-Resonance Editor enezilinganiso zezithameli kanye nezindlela zokulungisa ngokuchofoza kanye
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engama-30: Ukwenza izinguquko eziqondisiwe ngokusekelwe esilinganisweni sokwamukeleka kubalaleli.

items.title: Ukuzenzakalela Kokukhiqiza
items.description: Amathebhu athi "Script" kanye "Shoot" aqondisa inqubo kusukela ku-Foundation → Pre-Vis → Footage → Mixer kuya ku-Streams. Izindawo zokuhlola ngesigcawu ngasinye zinciphisa isidingo sokuphinda umsebenzi; i-Screening Room iphethe ukubuka kuqala, ukuhlanganisa, kanye nokushicilela.
keyFeatures: Foundation — umbhalo, amazwi, umsindo wesigcawu, Audience Resonance
Ukubuka kuqala (Pre-Vis) — izinkomba, umsindo, kanye nezithombe ezibalulekile (beat frames) zesigcawu ngasinye, kanye nezixhumanisi zokwabelana
Qopha — Izithombe, i-Mixer, kanye nokusakaza ngaphandle kokuphuma endaweni yokukhiqiza.
Screening Room — ukubuka kuqala izigcawu, ukuhlanganisa okuyinhloko, ukukhombisa umphakathi, kanye nokushicilela ku-YouTube
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Ideshibhodi yokukhiqiza ebonisa ithebhu yombhalo (script), ithebhu yokudubula (shoot), kanye ne-Pre-Vis.
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esingemizuzwana engu-60: Qinisekisa umbhalo → Express Pre-vis ngesigcawu ngasinye → Qopha izithombe/ividiyo → I-Mixer → Imifudlana yokusakaza

items.title: Screening Room
items.description: Buka kuqala amavidiyo ezigcawu, hlanganisa inguqulo yokugcina, bese ushicilela — konke lokhu kwenziwa ngaphakathi esigabeni sokukhiqiza (Production). Thumela izixhumanisi eziyimfihlo kwababambe iqhaza ukuze bathumele imibono ehlelekile, kanye nokukhetha ukuthola imininingwane ehlaziya indlela abasebenzisana ngayo nokuqukethwe.
