Ukuhlanganiswa kokugcina — khetha i-Animatic noma ividiyo yesigcawu ngasinye bese ukhiqiza ifayela elilodwa le-MP4.
Ukuhlolwa okungabiwa nabanye — izixhumanisi eziphephile ezihlanganisa ukunikezwa amaphuzu kanye nokuhlelwa kwempendulo
Shicilela — I-wizard ye-YouTube, ukukhiqizwa kwamavidiyo amafushane, kanye namaphakethe okusabalalisa
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Iphaneli yokuhlaziya kanye nempendulo yomhloli ye-Screening Room
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engu-30: Ukubamba umhlangano wokubuyekeza kanye nokuqoqa imininingwane mayelana nokubamba iqhaza

items.title: Ukuthembeka Nokuphepha
items.description: Izindlela zokuphepha eziningi ezisezingeni ngalinye lokukhiqiza: ukuphepha kwe-Google Vertex AI, Izinsizakalo Zokudala Ezandisiwe ezinezindlela zokuphepha, ukuqinisekiswa kokuqukethwe kwe-Studio okungakhethwa, kanye nobufakazi obuqinisekisiwe bemvelaphi yevidiyo eyingxenye.
keyFeatures: Ezokuphepha ezakhelwe ngaphakathi kwa-Google — I-Vertex Responsible AI kuyo yonke inqubo yokukhiqiza
Indlela yokubuyela emuva evikelekile — ukuhlolwa kwemizila ehlukile ngaphambi kokugcinwa kwedatha
Ukuqinisekiswa kokuqukethwe kwe-Studio — izinkomba zenqubomgomo ngaphambi kwenqubo enzima yokukhiqiza isithombe (rendering)
Ukuphoqelelwa kwemithetho — izexwayiso ezirekhodiwe kanye nemingcele eholela ekumisweni
Ubufakazi bemvelaphi obusayiniwe — ama-hashi okuqukethwe namarekhodi okuhlola ngesikhathi sokulethwa
items.screenshotSlot: Faka isithombe-skrini: Isigaba sokuqala se-Trust & Safety noma iphaneli yokuqinisekisa ye-Studio
items.videoSlot: Faka isiqeshana esithatha imizuzwana engu-45: Amazinga okwethenjwa lapho kufikwa khona → Izimpawu zokuqinisekisa ze-Studio → ukuvinjwa kwendlela evikelwe → imethadatha yomthombo → inqubomgomo yokwethenjwa nokuphepha

engineeringTrust.title: Yakhelwe
engineeringTrust.subtitle: Isakhiwo esivumelana nezinkampani ezisaqala, esinezakhi ze-Google Cloud ezisekela ezokuphepha, ukwanda, kanye nokulethwa kwemikhiqizo ngendlela ephathekayo.

pillars.title: Isakhiwo Sebhizinisi
pillars.description: Yakhiwe phezu kwengqalasizinda ye-Google Cloud, ihlanganisa uhlelo lokulawula nokuhlela imisebenzi (orchestration) olukwazi ukukhula ngokwezidingo zemisebenzi yokukhiqiza kanye namaqembu akhulayo.

pillars.title: Ezokuphepha noBumfihlo
pillars.description: Izinsiza zobuciko zihlala zivikelekile ngokusebenzisa ukubethela kwemininingwane egciniwe, izindlela zokulawula ukufinyelela, kanye nezinqubo ezibeka ubumfihlo phambili.
highlights: Bheka Inqubomgomo yethu Yobumfihlo mayelana nokuphathwa kwemininingwane.

pillars.title: Umthamo Nokwethembeka
pillars.description: Ukulethwa kwesevisi yamafu emhlabeni wonke kusekela izinqubo ezithembekile zokukhiqiza izithombe (rendering) nokubuyekeza njengoba umthamo wakho womsebenzi ukhula.

metrics.value: Amahora angama-24 ngosuku, izinsuku eziyi-7 ngesonto
metrics.label: Ukuqapha

cards.title: Ubumfihlo Bedatha
cards.description: Imibhalo yakho kanye nezinto ozidalile azisetshenziswa ukuqeqesha amamodeli abiwayo, okusiza ukuvikela amalungelo akho obunikazi bobuhlakani kanye nomsebenzi wamakhasimende akho.

cards.title: Yakhelwe ukuletha umkhiqizo othembekile
cards.description: Ingqalasizinda egxile ekukhiqizeni isiza ekugcineni izinqubo zokukhiqiza ezinzile ngezikhathi lapho isidingo siphezulu khona.

cards.title: Ukungaguquguquki Okucabangela Izinkomba
cards.description: I-SceneFlow isebenzisa indlela yokukhiqiza ecabangela izinkomba ukuze ithuthukise ukungaguquguquki kwabalingiswa, izindawo, kanye nezinto ezisetshenziswayo kusukela kwesinye isigcawu kuya kwesinye.

partnership.poweredBy: Inikwe amandla yi-Google Cloud kanye ne-Vertex AI, Isitoreji Samafu, kanye namathuluzi okuhumusha
partnership.footnote: I-SceneFlow AI isebenza engqalasizindeni ye-Google Cloud engakwazi ukukhula ngokwezidingo, eyenzelwe ukukhula kwamabhizinisi asaqala kanye nezidingo zamabhizinisi amakhulu.

engineeringTrust.trustSafeguardLink: Ukwethenjwa okunezendlalelo: Ukuphepha kwe-Google Vertex kanye nezindlela zokuvikela ze-SceneFlow, ukuqinisekisa, kanye nomthombo — bheka isigaba esithi Ukwethenjwa Nokuphepha ngezansi.

audienceResonance.title: Audience Resonance Ukuhlaziya
audienceResonance.description: Yazi amaphuzu akho ngaphambi kokuba utshale imali ekukhiqizeni izithombe noma amavidiyo aphelele (full renders). Hlose ukuthola amaphuzu angu-Audience Resonance kanye no-Blueprint, futhi ulungise umbhalo ngokwenza izinguquko ezisebenzisekayo — thuthukisa isigaba ngasinye ngaphambi kwesigaba se-Express nokukhiqizwa kwevidiyo.
bullets: Thola amaphuzu, ukuhlaziya, nezincomo ngesikhathi sangempela.
Izixazululo zokulungisa ubuthakathaka bendaba ngokuchofoza kanye
Ukuhlela okuqondisiwe ukuze kuthuthukiswe iziqephu, i-Blueprint, kanye nombhalo

howWeScore.title: Indlela i-Audience Resonance esebenza ngayo
howWeScore.description: I-Audience Resonance ihlanganisa ukuhlaziywa kwesakhiwo sendaba (ukucaca, isivinini sokuhamba kwendaba, kanye nokushintsha-shintsha kwemizwa) nokuhambisana nohlobo lwezethameli ozichaze ku-Blueprint — hhayi izibalo ezingabalulekile noma imininingwane yokuthi abantu baqhubeka kanjani nokubuka okuqukethwe ngemuva kokushicilelwa. Izincomo zihlotshaniswa nezingxenye ezithile zombhalo, okukuvumela ukuthi ulungise izinkinga ngaphambi kwesigaba se-Express noma ukukhiqizwa kwevidiyo.
bullets: Linganisela amaphuzu e-Blueprint kanye nombhalo ngokuhambisana nezithameli oziqondisile.
Izincomo ezisezingeni lesigaba — hhayi inombolo engacacile edinga ukuthi "usithembe" nje
Izixazululo ezisebenzisekayo ngokuchofoza kanye kanye nokuhlela okuqondiswayo — hhayi nje ukuthola amamaki
Yenza lokhu ngaphambi kokusebenzisa imali eningi ekwenzeni i-render, hhayi ngemuva kokushicilela.

express.title: Sceneflow Express
express.description: Khiqiza ngokuzenzakalelayo ama-pre-vis, ama-animatic, kanye nezigaba zevidiyo ngesikhathi esisodwa. Suka embhalweni uye ekubukeni kuqala okungabelwana ngakho emizuzwini embalwa — bese uvumela i-Beat Frames ngaphambi kokuba kwenziwe izindleko zokugcina ze-F2V.

items.title: Express Pre-vis
items.desc: Bukeza futhi wabelane ngama-pre-vis omsindo nevidiyo ngemizuzu kunamahora.

items.title: Veza ama-Animatic
items.desc: Khiqiza izigcawu eziphelele zohlobo lwe-Ken Burns ezinezithombe ezinyakazayo kanye nemisindo yezwi esezingeni eliphezulu ngokushesha.

items.title: Ividiyo Esheshayo
items.desc: Lawula ukukhiqizwa kwezithombe namavidiyo ngesikhathi esisodwa—kuhlanganise nochungechunge lwezandiso ze-Veo ezakhelwe ngaphakathi ukuze kusekelwe izingxenye ezinde zezingxoxo.

preVisEngine.title: Pre-Visualization Engine
preVisEngine.subtitle: Ukukhiqiza i-animatic (uhlobo lwe-video eyisibonelo sokuqala) ethatha imizuzu engu-40, enamazwi nomculo, kungakapheli imizuzu engu-15 akuyona nje isinyathelo sokusebenza — kodwa kuwumkhiqizo uqobo. E-Hollywood, lesi sigaba sokwakha isibonelo sokuqala sithatha amasonto futhi sibiza izinkulungwane eziningi zamadola. I-SceneFlow yenza lokhu kwenzeke ngemizuzu nangemali encane kakhulu.
preVisEngine.narrative: Embonini yamafilimu, i-storyboard yinto oyinikeza ithimba lokusebenza. I-Pre-vis yinto oyikhombisa abaphathi besitudiyo, abatshali-zimali, kanye nabakhiqizi ukuze uthole imvume yokuqala iphrojekthi. I-SceneFlow iphakamisa izinga lokukhiqiza lisuka ekubeni ithuluzi nje labadali abazimele liye ekubeni yingxenye ebalulekile yohlelo lokusebenza lwezinga lebhizinisi.

pillars.title: Isethulo Sebhizinisi Esiphelele
pillars.description: Layisha umbhalo bese ungena emhlanganweni wokwethula iphrojekthi uphethe uhlaka olubonakalayo lwangaphambi kokukhiqiza (pre-vis) oluhlanganisa amazwi, umculo, nezilimi eziningi, kanye nedatha eqinile evela ku-Audience Resonance. Nikeza abadali indlela esheshayo nephumelelayo — esekelwe kudatha kanye nezinto ezibonakalayo nezizwakalayo — yokwenza amafilimu abo.

pillars.title: Isigaba Sangaphambi Kokukhiqiza Esivumela Ukuthola Amaphutha Ngokushesha
pillars.description: Indlela evamile yokwenza uhlaka lokuqala lwevidiyo (pre-visualization) idinga ochwepheshe bokugqwayiza nge-3D, abadwebi bezithombe ezichaza ukulandelana kwezigcawu, kanye nabalingisi bamazwi isikhathi esingamasonto amaningi. Uma isigcawu singaphumeleli, kuchithwa izinkulungwane eziningi zamadola. Ungenza izinguquko nokulungisa uhlaka kungakapheli imizuzu engu-15, ngaphambi kokuba kuqashwe ngisho nelungu elilodwa lethimba lekhamera.

pillars.title: Ukuhlaziywa Kwezindaba Zezezimali
pillars.description: Lokhu kuheha ingxenye yomkhakha eqaphe kakhulu mayelana nobungozi: abaxhasi bezimali. Khombisa ukuthi isivinini sokuhamba kwendaba, isimo sayo, kanye nezingxoxo kuhambisana kanjani nezethameli ezihlosiwe ngaphambi kokuba kuchithwe ngisho idola elilodwa ekukhiqizeni.

workflow.title: Ukulayishwa kombhalo → ukuboniswa kwangaphambili okulungele ukuvunywa
steps: Layisha imibhalo yamafilimu ehambisana namazinga omkhakha (.fountain, .fdx, .txt)
Sebenzisa uhlelo lokuhlola lwe-Audience Resonance eqenjini labantu oqondise kulo umsebenzi wakho.
Dala Express Pre-vis — ama-animatic anomsindo nomculo ngemizuzu embalwa
Yabelana ngakho ukuze kubuyekezwe abathintekayo ngaphambi kokuba kusetshenziswe izimali zokugcina zevidiyo.

preVisEngine.ctaSubtext: Vala igebe phakathi kokwenziwa kwamafilimu okwakudala kanye ne-Generative AI

exitIntent.title: Yima! Ungahambi ungenalutho.
exitIntent.subtitle: Thola ukufinyelela kwangaphambili okukhethekile namathiphu okwenza amafilimu kusetshenziswa ubuchwepheshe be-AI.
benefits: Izifundo zamasonto onke zokwenza amafilimu kusetshenziswa i-AI
exitIntent.privacy: Ayikho imiyalezo engafuneki, nhlobo. Ungazikhipha ohlwini noma nini.
exitIntent.successSubtitle: Bheka ibhokisi lakho lemiyalezo ukuze uthole amathiphu akhethekile okwenza amafilimu kanye nezibuyekezo zokuthola ukufinyelela kusenesikhathi.

pricing.title: Khokhela lokho okudalayo
pricing.subtitle: Uhlelo olulodwa oluyisisekelo lokufinyelela inkundla. Amakhredithi okukhiqiza okuqukethwe nge-AI. Engeza amakhredithi uma udinga engeziwe. Ukulawula okuphelele, akukho okumoshekayo.

valueAnchor.saveBadge: Yonga u-90% noma ngaphezulu kuphrojekthi ngayinye

teamCta.title: Ithimba langaphakathi noma isikhungo?
teamCta.description: Bhukha iseshini yokubuka inqubo yokusebenza yamaqembu ezokuxhumana, ezokuthuthukiswa kwabasebenzi (L&D), kanye nawokumaketha.

agencyCta.title: I-ejensi noma indawo yokukhiqiza?
agencyCta.description: Amakhredithi enzelwe izidingo zakho, i-SLA, kanye nokwesekwa okuzinikele ngezinga elikhulu

byok.title: Letha Ukhiye Wakho
byok.description: Ingabe usunazo kakade izinkinobho ze-API ze-Vertex AI noma ze-ElevenLabs? Zisebenzise ne-SceneFlow AI ukuze wonge kufika ku-80% kumakhredithi enkundla.

benefits.title: Ukonga okungu-80% esikweletini se-SceneFlow
benefits.description: Khokha kuphela imali yesikhulumi engu-20% yokuhlanganisa nokulawula izinqubo kanye namathuluzi.

benefits.title: Sebenzisa izinhlelo zenkampani ukuze uzuze
benefits.description: Sebenzisa izaphulelo zakho ezikhona zamanani amakhulu ze-Vertex AI noma ze-ElevenLabs

benefits.title: Ukulawula okuphelele
benefits.description: Izikhiye zakho, ukukhokhiswa kwakho, ukuphathwa kwezindleko zakho

byok.elevenLabsDetail: Ukuguqulwa kombhalo ube yinkulumo nokukopisha izwi
byok.note: Ukonga okukhonjisiwe kuncike ekongeni okwenziwa yinkundla ye-SceneFlow. Izindleko zakho eziphelele zangempela zincike ezintengo ze-API zakho siqu noma zenkampani yakho kumhlinzeki ngamunye.

creditTopUps.title: Udinga amakhredithi engeziwe?
creditTopUps.subtitle: Faka imali noma nini. Amakhredithi awaphelelwa yisikhathi.

calculator.sectionSubtitle: Yazi kahle ukuthi uzokhokha malini ngaphambi kokuba uzibophezele.
calculator.title: Isibali Sesabelomali Sephrojekthi
calculator.subtitle: Linganisela amakhredithi ngaphambi kokuba uqale.
calculator.byokDescription: Sebenzisa okhiye bakho be-API ukuze wonge kufika ku-80% kumakhredithi e-SceneFlow. Ukhokhela abahlinzeki be-AI ngqo ngamanani abo.
calculator.transparency: Ukucaca okuphelele: Uzobona ukusetshenziswa kwamakhredithi ngesikhathi sangempela njengoba usebenza. Akukho okuzokumangaza—ungashintsha ububanzi bephrojekthi yakho noma nini.
calculator.byokDisclaimer: BYOK Qaphela: Ukonga okukhonjisiwe kukhombisa kuphela ukuncishiswa kwesikweletu senkundla ye-SceneFlow. Izindleko zakho zangempela zincike ezinhlelweni zakho zamanani ze-Vertex AI ne-ElevenLabs. Izinhlelo zezinkampani noma ezihilela umthamo ophezulu we-API zingahlinzeka ngokonga okwengeziwe.

finalCta.title: Usukulungele ukuhlola uhlelo lokusebenza oluphelele?
finalCta.subtitle: Yenza yonke inqubo—kusukela emcabangweni, ekubukezweni kwangaphambili (pre-vis) nasekukhiqizweni kwevidiyo kuya ekugcinweni kwefayela le-MP4—esitudiyweni esisodwa. Qala ngohlelo olubiza u-$9 Explorer ukuze ubone indlela yokusebenza ebeka isigqi (beat) phambili isebenza ngempela.

footer.description: Ukukhiqizwa kwamavidiyo okuzenzakalelayo okuphelele — kusukela emcabangweni kuya kumkhiqizo wokugcina osekulungele ukushicilelwa. Isitudiyo esisodwa esiqondiswayo: Blueprint → Ukukhiqiza → Screening Room.
footer.securePayments: Izinkokhelo eziphephile ezicutshungulwa yi-Whop, umhlinzeki wethu osemthethweni wokwamukela izinkokhelo
footer.morLine: Izinkokhelo eziphephile, ukubalwa kwentela, kanye nokuhambisana nemithetho kuphathwa yi-Whop, okuyiyo inhlangano yethu ebhalisiwe yokuqhuba ukuthengiselana (Merchant of Record), egameni le-Life Focus, LLC.
